verses.kjv: Zion heard, and was glad; and the daughters of Judah rejoiced because of thy judgments, O Lord.
verses.bsb: Zion hears and rejoices, and the towns of Judah exult because of Your judgments, O LORD.

verses.kjv: For thou, Lord, art high above all the earth: thou art exalted far above all gods.
verses.bsb: For You, O LORD, are Most High over all the earth; You are exalted far above all gods.

verses.kjv: Ye that love the Lord, hate evil: he preserveth the souls of his saints; he delivereth them out of the hand of the wicked.
verses.bsb: Hate evil, O you who love the LORD! He preserves the souls of His saints; He delivers them from the hand of the wicked.

verses.kjv: Light is sown for the righteous, and gladness for the upright in heart.
verses.bsb: Light shines on the righteous, gladness on the upright in heart.

verses.kjv: Rejoice in the Lord, ye righteous; and give thanks at the remembrance of his holiness.
verses.bsb: Rejoice in the LORD, you righteous ones, and praise His holy name.

verses.kjv: O SING unto the Lord a new song; for he hath done marvellous things: his right hand, and his holy arm, hath gotten him the victory.
verses.bsb: Sing to the LORD a new song, for He has done wonders; His right hand and holy arm have gained Him the victory.

verses.kjv: The Lord hath made known his salvation: his righteousness hath he openly shewed in the sight of the heathen.
verses.bsb: The LORD has proclaimed His salvation and revealed His righteousness to the nations.

verses.kjv: He hath remembered his mercy and his truth toward the house of Israel: all the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.
verses.bsb: He has remembered His love and faithfulness to the house of Israel; all the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.

verses.kjv: Make a joyful noise unto the Lord, all the earth: make a loud noise, and rejoice, and sing praise.
verses.bsb: Make a joyful noise to the LORD, all the earth; break forth—let your cry ring out, and sing praises!

verses.kjv: Sing unto the Lord with the harp; with the harp, and the voice of a psalm.
verses.bsb: Sing praises to the LORD with the lyre, in melodious song with the harp.

verses.kjv: With trumpets and sound of cornet make a joyful noise before the Lord, the King.
verses.bsb: With trumpets and the blast of the ram’s horn shout for joy before the LORD, the King.

verses.kjv: Let the sea roar, and the fulness thereof; the world, and they that dwell therein.
verses.bsb: Let the sea resound, and all that fills it, the world, and all who dwell in it.

verses.kjv: Let the floods clap their hands: let the hills be joyful together
verses.bsb: Let the rivers clap their hands, let the mountains sing together for joy

verses.kjv: Before the Lord; for he cometh to judge the earth: with righteousness shall he judge the world, and the people with equity.
verses.bsb: before the LORD, for He comes to judge the earth. He will judge the world with righteousness and the peoples with equity.

verses.kjv: THE Lord reigneth; let the people tremble: he sitteth between the cherubims; let the earth be moved.
verses.bsb: The LORD reigns; let the nations tremble! He is enthroned above the cherubim; let the earth quake!

verses.kjv: The Lord is great in Zion; and he is high above all the people.
verses.bsb: Great is the LORD in Zion; He is exalted above all the peoples.

verses.kjv: Let them praise thy great and terrible name; for it is holy.
verses.bsb: Let them praise Your great and awesome name— He is holy!

verses.kjv: The king’s strength also loveth judgment; thou dost establish equity, thou executest judgment and righteousness in Jacob.
verses.bsb: The mighty King loves justice. You have established equity; You have exercised justice and righteousness in Jacob.

verses.kjv: Exalt ye the Lord our God, and worship at his footstool; for he is holy.
verses.bsb: Exalt the LORD our God, and worship at His footstool; He is holy!

verses.kjv: Moses and Aaron among his priests, and Samuel among them that call upon his name; they called upon the Lord, and he answered them.
verses.bsb: Moses and Aaron were among His priests; Samuel was among those who called on His name. They called to the LORD and He answered.

verses.kjv: He spake unto them in the cloudy pillar: they kept his testimonies, and the ordinance that he gave them.
verses.bsb: He spoke to them from the pillar of cloud; they kept His decrees and the statutes He gave them.

verses.kjv: Thou answeredst them, O Lord our God: thou wast a God that forgavest them, though thou tookest vengeance of their inventions.
verses.bsb: O LORD our God, You answered them. You were a forgiving God to them, yet an avenger of their misdeeds.

verses.kjv: Exalt the Lord our God, and worship at his holy hill; for the Lord our God is holy.
verses.bsb: Exalt the LORD our God and worship at His holy mountain, for the LORD our God is holy.

verses.kjv: MAKE a joyful noise unto the Lord, all ye lands.
verses.bsb: Make a joyful noise to the LORD, all the earth.

verses.kjv: Serve the Lord with gladness: come before his presence with singing.
verses.bsb: Serve the LORD with gladness; come into His presence with joyful songs.

verses.kjv: Know ye that the Lord he is God: it is he that hath made us, and not we ourselves; we are his people, and the sheep of his pasture.
verses.bsb: Know that the LORD is God. It is He who made us, and we are His; we are His people, and the sheep of His pasture.

verses.kjv: Enter into his gates with thanksgiving, and into his courts with praise: be thankful unto him, and bless his name.
verses.bsb: Enter His gates with thanksgiving and His courts with praise; give thanks to Him and bless His name.

verses.kjv: For the Lord is good; his mercy is everlasting; and his truth endureth to all generations.
verses.bsb: For the LORD is good, and His loving devotion endures forever; His faithfulness continues to all generations.

verses.kjv: I WILL sing of mercy and judgment: unto thee, O Lord, will I sing.
verses.bsb: I will sing of Your loving devotion and justice; to You, O LORD, I will sing praises.

verses.kjv: I will behave myself wisely in a perfect way. O when wilt thou come unto me? I will walk within my house with a perfect heart.
verses.bsb: I will ponder the way that is blameless— when will You come to me? I will walk in my house with integrity of heart.

verses.kjv: I will set no wicked thing before mine eyes: I hate the work of them that turn aside; it shall not cleave to me.
verses.bsb: I will set no worthless thing before my eyes. I hate the work of those who fall away; it shall not cling to me.

verses.kjv: A froward heart shall depart from me: I will not know a wicked person.
verses.bsb: A perverse heart shall depart from me; I will know nothing of evil.

verses.kjv: Whoso privily slandereth his neighbour, him will I cut off: him that hath an high look and a proud heart will not I suffer.
verses.bsb: Whoever slanders his neighbor in secret, I will put to silence; the one with haughty eyes and a proud heart, I will not endure.

verses.kjv: Mine eyes shall be upon the faithful of the land, that they may dwell with me: he that walketh in a perfect way, he shall serve me.
verses.bsb: My eyes favor the faithful of the land, that they may dwell with me; he who walks in the way of integrity shall minister to me.

verses.kjv: He that worketh deceit shall not dwell within my house: he that telleth lies shall not tarry in my sight.
verses.bsb: No one who practices deceit shall dwell in my house; no one who tells lies shall stand in my presence.

verses.kjv: I will early destroy all the wicked of the land; that I may cut off all wicked doers from the city of the Lord.
verses.bsb: Every morning I will remove all the wicked of the land, that I may cut off every evildoer from the city of the LORD.

verses.kjv: HEAR my prayer, O Lord, and let my cry come unto thee.
verses.bsb: Hear my prayer, O LORD; let my cry for help come before You.

verses.kjv: Hide not thy face from me in the day when I am in trouble; incline thine ear unto me: in the day when I call answer me speedily.
verses.bsb: Do not hide Your face from me in my day of distress. Incline Your ear to me; answer me quickly when I call.

verses.kjv: For my days are consumed like smoke, and my bones are burned as an hearth.
verses.bsb: For my days vanish like smoke, and my bones burn like glowing embers.

verses.kjv: My heart is smitten, and withered like grass; so that I forget to eat my bread.
verses.bsb: My heart is afflicted, and withered like grass; I even forget to eat my bread.

verses.kjv: By reason of the voice of my groaning my bones cleave to my skin.
verses.bsb: Through my loud groaning my flesh clings to my bones.

verses.kjv: I am like a pelican of the wilderness: I am like an owl of the desert.
verses.bsb: I am like a desert owl, like an owl among the ruins.

verses.kjv: I watch, and am as a sparrow alone upon the house top.
verses.bsb: I lie awake; I am like a lone bird on a housetop.

verses.kjv: Mine enemies reproach me all the day; and they that are mad against me are sworn against me.
verses.bsb: All day long my enemies taunt me; they ridicule me and curse me.

verses.kjv: For I have eaten ashes like bread, and mingled my drink with weeping,
verses.bsb: For I have eaten ashes like bread and mixed my drink with tears

verses.kjv: Because of thine indignation and thy wrath: for thou hast lifted me up, and cast me down.
verses.bsb: because of Your indignation and wrath, for You have picked me up and cast me aside.

verses.kjv: My days are like a shadow that declineth; and I am withered like grass.
verses.bsb: My days are like lengthening shadows, and I wither away like grass.

verses.kjv: But thou, O Lord, shalt endure for ever; and thy remembrance unto all generations.
verses.bsb: But You, O LORD, sit enthroned forever; Your renown endures to all generations.

verses.kjv: Thou shalt arise, and have mercy upon Zion: for the time to favour her, yea, the set time, is come.
verses.bsb: You will rise up and have compassion on Zion, for it is time to show her favor— the appointed time has come.

verses.kjv: For thy servants take pleasure in her stones, and favour the dust thereof.
verses.bsb: For Your servants delight in her stones and take pity on her dust.

verses.kjv: So the heathen shall fear the name of the Lord, and all the kings of the earth thy glory.
verses.bsb: So the nations will fear the name of the LORD, and all the kings of the earth will fear Your glory.

verses.kjv: When the Lord shall build up Zion, he shall appear in his glory.
verses.bsb: For the LORD will rebuild Zion; He has appeared in His glory.

verses.kjv: He will regard the prayer of the destitute, and not despise their prayer.
verses.bsb: He will turn toward the prayer of the destitute; He will not despise their prayer.

verses.kjv: This shall be written for the generation to come: and the people which shall be created shall praise the Lord.
verses.bsb: Let this be written for the generation to come, so that a people not yet created may praise the LORD.

verses.kjv: For he hath looked down from the height of his sanctuary; from heaven did the Lord behold the earth;
verses.bsb: For He looked down from the heights of His sanctuary; the LORD gazed out from heaven to earth

verses.kjv: To hear the groaning of the prisoner; to loose those that are appointed to death;
verses.bsb: to hear a prisoner’s groaning, to release those condemned to death,

verses.kjv: To declare the name of the Lord in Zion, and his praise in Jerusalem;
verses.bsb: that they may proclaim the name of the LORD in Zion and praise Him in Jerusalem,

verses.kjv: When the people are gathered together, and the kingdoms, to serve the Lord.
verses.bsb: when peoples and kingdoms assemble to serve the LORD.

verses.kjv: He weakened my strength in the way; he shortened my days.
verses.bsb: He has broken my strength on the way; He has cut short my days.

verses.kjv: I said, O my God, take me not away in the midst of my days: thy years are throughout all generations.
verses.bsb: I say: “O my God, do not take me in the midst of my days! Your years go on through all generations.

verses.kjv: Of old hast thou laid the foundation of the earth: and the heavens are the work of thy hands.
verses.bsb: In the beginning You laid the foundations of the earth, and the heavens are the work of Your hands.

verses.kjv: They shall perish, but thou shalt endure: yea, all of them shall wax old like a garment; as a vesture shalt thou change them, and they shall be changed:
verses.bsb: They will perish, but You remain; they will all wear out like a garment. Like clothing You will change them, and they will be passed on.

verses.kjv: But thou art the same, and thy years shall have no end.
verses.bsb: But You remain the same, and Your years will never end.

verses.kjv: The children of thy servants shall continue, and their seed shall be established before thee.
verses.bsb: The children of Your servants will dwell securely, and their descendants will be established before You.”

verses.kjv: BLESS the Lord, O my soul: and all that is within me, bless his holy name.
verses.bsb: Bless the LORD, O my soul; all that is within me, bless His holy name.

verses.kjv: Bless the Lord, O my soul, and forget not all his benefits:
verses.bsb: Bless the LORD, O my soul, and do not forget all His kind deeds—

verses.kjv: Who forgiveth all thine iniquities; who healeth all thy diseases;
verses.bsb: He who forgives all your iniquities and heals all your diseases,

verses.kjv: Who redeemeth thy life from destruction; who crowneth thee with lovingkindness and tender mercies;
verses.bsb: who redeems your life from the Pit and crowns you with loving devotion and compassion,

verses.kjv: Who satisfieth thy mouth with good things; so that thy youth is renewed like the eagle’s.
verses.bsb: who satisfies you with good things, so that your youth is renewed like the eagle’s.

verses.kjv: The Lord executeth righteousness and judgment for all that are oppressed.
verses.bsb: The LORD executes righteousness and justice for all the oppressed.

verses.kjv: He made known his ways unto Moses, his acts unto the children of Israel.
verses.bsb: He made known His ways to Moses, His deeds to the people of Israel.

verses.kjv: The Lord is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy.
verses.bsb: The LORD is compassionate and gracious, slow to anger, abounding in loving devotion.

verses.kjv: He will not always chide: neither will he keep his anger for ever.
verses.bsb: He will not always accuse us, nor harbor His anger forever.

verses.kjv: He hath not dealt with us after our sins; nor rewarded us according to our iniquities.
verses.bsb: He has not dealt with us according to our sins or repaid us according to our iniquities.

verses.kjv: For as the heaven is high above the earth, so great is his mercy toward them that fear him.
verses.bsb: For as high as the heavens are above the earth, so great is His loving devotion for those who fear Him.

verses.kjv: As far as the east is from the west, so far hath he removed our transgressions from us.
verses.bsb: As far as the east is from the west, so far has He removed our transgressions from us.

verses.kjv: Like as a father pitieth his children, so the Lord pitieth them that fear him.
verses.bsb: As a father has compassion on his children, so the LORD has compassion on those who fear Him.

verses.kjv: For he knoweth our frame; he remembereth that we are dust.
verses.bsb: For He knows our frame; He is mindful that we are dust.

verses.kjv: As for man, his days are as grass: as a flower of the field, so he flourisheth.
verses.bsb: As for man, his days are like grass— he blooms like a flower of the field;

verses.kjv: For the wind passeth over it, and it is gone; and the place thereof shall know it no more.
verses.bsb: when the wind passes over, it vanishes, and its place remembers it no more.

verses.kjv: But the mercy of the Lord is from everlasting to everlasting upon them that fear him, and his righteousness unto children’s children;
verses.bsb: But from everlasting to everlasting the loving devotion of the LORD extends to those who fear Him, and His righteousness to their children’s children—

verses.kjv: To such as keep his covenant, and to those that remember his commandments to do them.
verses.bsb: to those who keep His covenant and remember to obey His precepts.

verses.kjv: The Lord hath prepared his throne in the heavens; and his kingdom ruleth over all.
verses.bsb: The LORD has established His throne in heaven, and His kingdom rules over all.

verses.kjv: Bless the Lord, ye his angels, that excel in strength, that do his commandments, hearkening unto the voice of his word.
verses.bsb: Bless the LORD, all His angels mighty in strength who carry out His word, who hearken to the voice of His command.

verses.kjv: Bless ye the Lord, all ye his hosts; ye ministers of his, that do his pleasure.
verses.bsb: Bless the LORD, all His hosts, you servants who do His will.

verses.kjv: Bless the Lord, all his works in all places of his dominion: bless the Lord, O my soul.
verses.bsb: Bless the LORD, all His works in all places of His dominion.   Bless the LORD, O my soul!

verses.kjv: BLESS the Lord, O my soul. O Lord my God, thou art very great; thou art clothed with honour and majesty.
verses.bsb: Bless the LORD, O my soul!   O LORD my God, You are very great; You are clothed with splendor and majesty.

verses.kjv: Who coverest thyself with light as with a garment: who stretchest out the heavens like a curtain:
verses.bsb: He wraps Himself in light as with a garment; He stretches out the heavens like a tent,

verses.kjv: Who layeth the beams of his chambers in the waters: who maketh the clouds his chariot: who walketh upon the wings of the wind:
verses.bsb: laying the beams of His chambers in the waters above, making the clouds His chariot, walking on the wings of the wind.

verses.kjv: Who maketh his angels spirits; his ministers a flaming fire:
verses.bsb: He makes the winds His messengers, flames of fire His servants.

verses.kjv: Who laid the foundations of the earth, that it should not be removed for ever.
verses.bsb: He set the earth on its foundations, never to be moved.

verses.kjv: Thou coveredst it with the deep as with a garment: the waters stood above the mountains.
verses.bsb: You covered it with the deep like a garment; the waters stood above the mountains.

verses.kjv: At thy rebuke they fled; at the voice of thy thunder they hasted away.
verses.bsb: At Your rebuke the waters fled; at the sound of Your thunder they hurried away—

verses.kjv: They go up by the mountains; they go down by the valleys unto the place which thou hast founded for them.
verses.bsb: the mountains rose and the valleys sank to the place You assigned for them—

verses.kjv: Thou hast set a bound that they may not pass over; that they turn not again to cover the earth.
verses.bsb: You set a boundary they cannot cross, that they may never again cover the earth.

verses.kjv: He sendeth the springs into the valleys, which run among the hills.
verses.bsb: He sends forth springs in the valleys; they flow between the mountains.

verses.kjv: They give drink to every beast of the field: the wild asses quench their thirst.
verses.bsb: They give drink to every beast of the field; the wild donkeys quench their thirst.

verses.kjv: By them shall the fowls of the heaven have their habitation, which sing among the branches.
verses.bsb: The birds of the air nest beside the springs; they sing among the branches.

verses.kjv: He watereth the hills from his chambers: the earth is satisfied with the fruit of thy works.
verses.bsb: He waters the mountains from His chambers; the earth is satisfied by the fruit of His works.

verses.kjv: He causeth the grass to grow for the cattle, and herb for the service of man: that he may bring forth food out of the earth;
verses.bsb: He makes the grass grow for the livestock and provides crops for man to cultivate, bringing forth food from the earth:

verses.kjv: And wine that maketh glad the heart of man, and oil to make his face to shine, and bread which strengtheneth man’s heart.
verses.bsb: wine that gladdens the heart of man, oil that makes his face to shine, and bread that sustains his heart.

verses.kjv: The trees of the Lord are full of sap; the cedars of Lebanon, which he hath planted;
verses.bsb: The trees of the LORD have their fill, the cedars of Lebanon that He planted,

verses.kjv: Where the birds make their nests: as for the stork, the fir trees are her house.
verses.bsb: where the birds build their nests; the stork makes her home in the cypresses.

verses.kjv: The high hills are a refuge for the wild goats; and the rocks for the conies.
verses.bsb: The high mountains are for the wild goats, the cliffs a refuge for the rock badgers.

verses.kjv: He appointed the moon for seasons: the sun knoweth his going down.
verses.bsb: He made the moon to mark the seasons; the sun knows when to set.

verses.kjv: Thou makest darkness, and it is night: wherein all the beasts of the forest do creep forth.
verses.bsb: You bring darkness, and it becomes night, when all the beasts of the forest prowl.

verses.kjv: The young lions roar after their prey, and seek their meat from God.
verses.bsb: The young lions roar for their prey and seek their food from God.

verses.kjv: The sun ariseth, they gather themselves together, and lay them down in their dens.
verses.bsb: The sun rises, and they withdraw; they lie down in their dens.

verses.kjv: Man goeth forth unto his work and to his labour until the evening.
verses.bsb: Man goes forth to his work and to his labor until evening.

verses.kjv: O Lord, how manifold are thy works! in wisdom hast thou made them all: the earth is full of thy riches.
verses.bsb: How many are Your works, O LORD! In wisdom You have made them all; the earth is full of Your creatures.

verses.kjv: So is this great and wide sea, wherein are things creeping innumerable, both small and great beasts.
verses.bsb: Here is the sea, vast and wide, teeming with creatures beyond number, living things both great and small.

verses.kjv: There go the ships: there is that leviathan, whom thou hast made to play therein.
verses.bsb: There the ships pass, and Leviathan, which You formed to frolic there.

verses.kjv: These wait all upon thee; that thou mayest give them their meat in due season.
verses.bsb: All creatures look to You to give them their food in due season.

verses.kjv: That thou givest them they gather: thou openest thine hand, they are filled with good.
verses.bsb: When You give it to them, they gather it up; when You open Your hand, they are satisfied with good things.

verses.kjv: Thou hidest thy face, they are troubled: thou takest away their breath, they die, and return to their dust.
verses.bsb: When You hide Your face, they are terrified; when You take away their breath, they die and return to dust.

verses.kjv: Thou sendest forth thy spirit, they are created: and thou renewest the face of the earth.
verses.bsb: When You send Your Spirit, they are created, and You renew the face of the earth.

verses.kjv: The glory of the Lord shall endure for ever: the Lord shall rejoice in his works.
verses.bsb: May the glory of the LORD endure forever; may the LORD rejoice in His works.

verses.kjv: He looketh on the earth, and it trembleth: he toucheth the hills, and they smoke.
verses.bsb: He looks on the earth, and it trembles; He touches the mountains, and they smolder.

verses.kjv: I will sing unto the Lord as long as I live: I will sing praise to my God while I have my being.
verses.bsb: I will sing to the LORD all my life; I will sing praise to my God while I have my being.

verses.kjv: My meditation of him shall be sweet: I will be glad in the Lord.
verses.bsb: May my meditation be pleasing to Him, for I rejoice in the LORD.

verses.kjv: Let the sinners be consumed out of the earth, and let the wicked be no more. Bless thou the Lord, O my soul. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.bsb: May sinners vanish from the earth and the wicked be no more.   Bless the LORD, O my soul.   Hallelujah!

verses.kjv: O GIVE thanks unto the Lord; call upon his name: make known his deeds among the people.
verses.bsb: Give thanks to the LORD, call upon His name; make known His deeds among the nations.

verses.kjv: Sing unto him, sing psalms unto him: talk ye of all his wondrous works.
verses.bsb: Sing to Him, sing praises to Him; tell of all His wonders.

verses.kjv: Glory ye in his holy name: let the heart of them rejoice that seek the Lord.
verses.bsb: Glory in His holy name; let the hearts of those who seek the LORD rejoice.

verses.kjv: Seek the Lord, and his strength: seek his face evermore.
verses.bsb: Seek out the LORD and His strength; seek His face always.

verses.kjv: Remember his marvellous works that he hath done; his wonders, and the judgments of his mouth;
verses.bsb: Remember the wonders He has done, His marvels, and the judgments He has pronounced,

verses.kjv: O ye seed of Abraham his servant, ye children of Jacob his chosen.
verses.bsb: O offspring of His servant Abraham, O sons of Jacob, His chosen ones.

verses.kjv: He is the Lord our God: his judgments are in all the earth.
verses.bsb: He is the LORD our God; His judgments carry throughout the earth.

verses.kjv: He hath remembered his covenant for ever, the word which he commanded to a thousand generations.
verses.bsb: He remembers His covenant forever, the word He ordained for a thousand generations—

verses.kjv: Which covenant he made with Abraham, and his oath unto Isaac;
verses.bsb: the covenant He made with Abraham, and the oath He swore to Isaac.

verses.kjv: And confirmed the same unto Jacob for a law, and to Israel for an everlasting covenant:
verses.bsb: He confirmed it to Jacob as a decree, to Israel as an everlasting covenant:

verses.kjv: Saying, Unto thee will I give the land of Canaan, the lot of your inheritance:
verses.bsb: “I will give you the land of Canaan as the portion of your inheritance.”

verses.kjv: When they were but a few men in number; yea, very few, and strangers in it.
verses.bsb: When they were few in number, few indeed, and strangers in the land,

verses.kjv: When they went from one nation to another, from one kingdom to another people;
verses.bsb: they wandered from nation to nation, from one kingdom to another.

verses.kjv: He suffered no man to do them wrong: yea, he reproved kings for their sakes;
verses.bsb: He let no man oppress them; He rebuked kings on their behalf:

verses.kjv: Saying, Touch not mine anointed, and do my prophets no harm.
verses.bsb: “Do not touch My anointed ones! Do no harm to My prophets!”

verses.kjv: Moreover he called for a famine upon the land: he brake the whole staff of bread.
verses.bsb: He called down famine on the land and cut off all their supplies of food.

verses.kjv: He sent a man before them, even Joseph, who was sold for a servant:
verses.bsb: He sent a man before them— Joseph, sold as a slave.

verses.kjv: Whose feet they hurt with fetters: he was laid in iron:
verses.bsb: They bruised his feet with shackles and placed his neck in irons,

verses.kjv: Until the time that his word came: the word of the Lord tried him.
verses.bsb: until his prediction came true and the word of the LORD proved him right.

verses.kjv: The king sent and loosed him; even the ruler of the people, and let him go free.
verses.bsb: The king sent and released him; the ruler of peoples set him free.

verses.kjv: He made him lord of his house, and ruler of all his substance:
verses.bsb: He made him master of his household, ruler over all his substance,

verses.kjv: To bind his princes at his pleasure; and teach his senators wisdom.
verses.bsb: to instruct his princes as he pleased and teach his elders wisdom.

verses.kjv: Israel also came into Egypt; and Jacob sojourned in the land of Ham.
verses.bsb: Then Israel entered Egypt; Jacob dwelt in the land of Ham.

verses.kjv: And he increased his people greatly; and made them stronger than their enemies.
verses.bsb: And the LORD made His people very fruitful, more numerous than their foes,

verses.kjv: He turned their heart to hate his people, to deal subtilly with his servants.
verses.bsb: whose hearts He turned to hate His people, to conspire against His servants.

verses.kjv: He sent Moses his servant; and Aaron whom he had chosen.
verses.bsb: He sent Moses His servant, and Aaron, whom He had chosen.

verses.kjv: They shewed his signs among them, and wonders in the land of Ham.
verses.bsb: They performed His miraculous signs among them, and wonders in the land of Ham.

verses.kjv: He sent darkness, and made it dark; and they rebelled not against his word.
verses.bsb: He sent darkness, and it became dark— yet they defied His words.

verses.kjv: He turned their waters into blood, and slew their fish.
verses.bsb: He turned their waters to blood and caused their fish to die.

verses.kjv: Their land brought forth frogs in abundance, in the chambers of their kings.
verses.bsb: Their land teemed with frogs, even in their royal chambers.

verses.kjv: He spake, and there came divers sorts of flies, and lice in all their coasts.
verses.bsb: He spoke, and insects swarmed— gnats throughout their country.

verses.kjv: He gave them hail for rain, and flaming fire in their land.
verses.bsb: He gave them hail for rain, with lightning throughout their land.

verses.kjv: He smote their vines also and their fig trees; and brake the trees of their coasts.
verses.bsb: He struck their vines and fig trees and shattered the trees of their country.

verses.kjv: He spake, and the locusts came, and caterpillers, and that without number,
verses.bsb: He spoke, and the locusts came— young locusts without number.

verses.kjv: And did eat up all the herbs in their land, and devoured the fruit of their ground.
verses.bsb: They devoured every plant in their land and consumed the produce of their soil.

verses.kjv: He smote also all the firstborn in their land, the chief of all their strength.
verses.bsb: Then He struck all the firstborn in their land, the firstfruits of all their vigor.

verses.kjv: He brought them forth also with silver and gold: and there was not one feeble person among their tribes.
verses.bsb: He brought Israel out with silver and gold, and none among His tribes stumbled.

verses.kjv: Egypt was glad when they departed: for the fear of them fell upon them.
verses.bsb: Egypt was glad when they departed, for the dread of Israel had fallen on them.

verses.kjv: He spread a cloud for a covering; and fire to give light in the night.
verses.bsb: He spread a cloud as a covering and a fire to light up the night.

verses.kjv: The people asked, and he brought quails, and satisfied them with the bread of heaven.
verses.bsb: They asked, and He brought quail and satisfied them with the bread of heaven.

verses.kjv: He opened the rock, and the waters gushed out; they ran in the dry places like a river.
verses.bsb: He opened a rock, and water gushed out; it flowed like a river in the desert.

verses.kjv: For he remembered his holy promise, and Abraham his servant.
verses.bsb: For He remembered His holy promise to Abraham His servant.

verses.kjv: And he brought forth his people with joy, and his chosen with gladness:
verses.bsb: He brought forth His people with rejoicing, His chosen with shouts of joy.

verses.kjv: And gave them the lands of the heathen: and they inherited the labour of the people;
verses.bsb: He gave them the lands of the nations, that they might inherit the fruit of others’ labor,

verses.kjv: That they might observe his statutes, and keep his laws. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.bsb: that they might keep His statutes and obey His laws.   Hallelujah!

verses.kjv: PRAISE ye the Lord. O give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: Hallelujah!   Give thanks to the LORD, for He is good; His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: Who can utter the mighty acts of the Lord? who can shew forth all his praise?
verses.bsb: Who can describe the mighty acts of the LORD or fully proclaim His praise?

verses.kjv: Blessed are they that keep judgment, and he that doeth righteousness at all times.
verses.bsb: Blessed are those who uphold justice, who practice righteousness at all times.

verses.kjv: Remember me, O Lord, with the favour that thou bearest unto thy people: O visit me with thy salvation;
verses.bsb: Remember me, O LORD, in Your favor to Your people; visit me with Your salvation,

verses.kjv: That I may see the good of thy chosen, that I may rejoice in the gladness of thy nation, that I may glory with thine inheritance.
verses.bsb: that I may see the prosperity of Your chosen ones, and rejoice in the gladness of Your nation, and give glory with Your inheritance.

verses.kjv: We have sinned with our fathers, we have committed iniquity, we have done wickedly.
verses.bsb: We have sinned like our fathers; we have done wrong and acted wickedly.

verses.kjv: Our fathers understood not thy wonders in Egypt; they remembered not the multitude of thy mercies; but provoked him at the sea, even at the Red sea.
verses.bsb: Our fathers in Egypt did not grasp Your wonders or remember Your abundant kindness; but they rebelled by the sea, there at the Red Sea.

verses.kjv: Nevertheless he saved them for his name’s sake, that he might make his mighty power to be known.
verses.bsb: Yet He saved them for the sake of His name, to make His power known.

verses.kjv: He rebuked the Red sea also, and it was dried up: so he led them through the depths, as through the wilderness.
verses.bsb: He rebuked the Red Sea, and it dried up; He led them through the depths as through a desert.

verses.kjv: And he saved them from the hand of him that hated them, and redeemed them from the hand of the enemy.
verses.bsb: He saved them from the hand that hated them; He redeemed them from the hand of the enemy.

verses.kjv: And the waters covered their enemies: there was not one of them left.
verses.bsb: The waters covered their foes; not one of them remained.

verses.kjv: Then believed they his words; they sang his praise.
verses.bsb: Then they believed His promises and sang His praise.

verses.kjv: They soon forgat his works; they waited not for his counsel:
verses.bsb: Yet they soon forgot His works and failed to wait for His counsel.

verses.kjv: But lusted exceedingly in the wilderness, and tempted God in the desert.
verses.bsb: They craved intensely in the wilderness and tested God in the desert.

verses.kjv: And he gave them their request; but sent leanness into their soul.
verses.bsb: So He granted their request, but sent a wasting disease upon them.

verses.kjv: They envied Moses also in the camp, and Aaron the saint of the Lord.
verses.bsb: In the camp they envied Moses, as well as Aaron, the holy one of the LORD.

verses.kjv: The earth opened and swallowed up Dathan, and covered the company of Abiram.
verses.bsb: The earth opened up and swallowed Dathan; it covered the assembly of Abiram.

verses.kjv: And a fire was kindled in their company; the flame burned up the wicked.
verses.bsb: Then fire blazed through their company; flames consumed the wicked.

verses.kjv: They made a calf in Horeb, and worshipped the molten image.
verses.bsb: At Horeb they made a calf and worshiped a molten image.

verses.kjv: Thus they changed their glory into the similitude of an ox that eateth grass.
verses.bsb: They exchanged their Glory for the image of a grass-eating ox.

verses.kjv: They forgat God their saviour, which had done great things in Egypt;
verses.bsb: They forgot God their Savior, who did great things in Egypt,

verses.kjv: Wondrous works in the land of Ham, and terrible things by the Red sea.
verses.bsb: wondrous works in the land of Ham, and awesome deeds by the Red Sea.

verses.kjv: Therefore he said that he would destroy them, had not Moses his chosen stood before him in the breach, to turn away his wrath, lest he should destroy them.
verses.bsb: So He said He would destroy them— had not Moses His chosen one stood before Him in the breach to divert His wrath from destroying them.

verses.kjv: Yea, they despised the pleasant land, they believed not his word:
verses.bsb: They despised the pleasant land; they did not believe His promise.

verses.kjv: But murmured in their tents, and hearkened not unto the voice of the Lord.
verses.bsb: They grumbled in their tents and did not listen to the voice of the LORD.

verses.kjv: Therefore he lifted up his hand against them, to overthrow them in the wilderness:
verses.bsb: So He raised His hand and swore to cast them down in the wilderness,

verses.kjv: To overthrow their seed also among the nations, and to scatter them in the lands.
verses.bsb: to disperse their offspring among the nations and scatter them throughout the lands.

verses.kjv: They joined themselves also unto Baal-peor, and ate the sacrifices of the dead.
verses.bsb: They yoked themselves to Baal of Peor and ate sacrifices offered to lifeless gods.

verses.kjv: Thus they provoked him to anger with their inventions: and the plague brake in upon them.
verses.bsb: So they provoked the LORD to anger with their deeds, and a plague broke out among them.

verses.kjv: Then stood up Phinehas, and executed judgment: and so the plague was stayed.
verses.bsb: But Phinehas stood and intervened, and the plague was restrained.

verses.kjv: And that was counted unto him for righteousness unto all generations for evermore.
verses.bsb: It was credited to him as righteousness for endless generations to come.

verses.kjv: They angered him also at the waters of strife, so that it went ill with Moses for their sakes:
verses.bsb: At the waters of Meribah they angered the LORD, and trouble came to Moses because of them.

verses.kjv: Because they provoked his spirit, so that he spake unadvisedly with his lips.
verses.bsb: For they rebelled against His Spirit, and Moses spoke rashly with his lips.

verses.kjv: They did not destroy the nations, concerning whom the Lord commanded them:
verses.bsb: They did not destroy the peoples as the LORD had commanded them,

verses.kjv: But were mingled among the heathen, and learned their works.
verses.bsb: but they mingled with the nations and adopted their customs.

verses.kjv: And they served their idols: which were a snare unto them.
verses.bsb: They worshiped their idols, which became a snare to them.

verses.kjv: Yea, they sacrificed their sons and their daughters unto devils,
verses.bsb: They sacrificed their sons and their daughters to demons.

verses.kjv: And shed innocent blood, even the blood of their sons and of their daughters, whom they sacrificed unto the idols of Canaan: and the land was polluted with blood.
verses.bsb: They shed innocent blood— the blood of their sons and daughters, whom they sacrificed to the idols of Canaan, and the land was polluted with blood.

verses.kjv: Thus were they defiled with their own works, and went a whoring with their own inventions.
verses.bsb: They defiled themselves by their actions and prostituted themselves by their deeds.

verses.kjv: Therefore was the wrath of the Lord kindled against his people, insomuch that he abhorred his own inheritance.
verses.bsb: So the anger of the LORD burned against His people, and He abhorred His own inheritance.

verses.kjv: And he gave them into the hand of the heathen; and they that hated them ruled over them.
verses.bsb: He delivered them into the hand of the nations, and those who hated them ruled over them.

verses.kjv: Their enemies also oppressed them, and they were brought into subjection under their hand.
verses.bsb: Their enemies oppressed them, and subdued them under their hand.

verses.kjv: Many times did he deliver them; but they provoked him with their counsel, and were brought low for their iniquity.
verses.bsb: Many times He rescued them, but they were bent on rebellion and sank down in their iniquity.

verses.kjv: Nevertheless he regarded their affliction, when he heard their cry:
verses.bsb: Nevertheless He heard their cry; He took note of their distress.

verses.kjv: And he remembered for them his covenant, and repented according to the multitude of his mercies.
verses.bsb: And He remembered His covenant with them, and relented by the abundance of His loving devotion.

verses.kjv: He made them also to be pitied of all those that carried them captives.
verses.bsb: He made them objects of compassion to all who held them captive.

verses.kjv: Save us, O Lord our God, and gather us from among the heathen, to give thanks unto thy holy name, and to triumph in thy praise.
verses.bsb: Save us, O LORD our God, and gather us from the nations, that we may give thanks to Your holy name, that we may glory in Your praise.

verses.kjv: Blessed be the Lord God of Israel from everlasting to everlasting: and let all the people say, Amen. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.bsb: Blessed be the LORD, the God of Israel, from everlasting to everlasting.   Let all the people say, “Amen!”   Hallelujah!

verses.kjv: O GIVE thanks unto the Lord, for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: Give thanks to the LORD, for He is good; His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: Let the redeemed of the Lord say so, whom he hath redeemed from the hand of the enemy;
verses.bsb: Let the redeemed of the LORD say so, whom He has redeemed from the hand of the enemy

verses.kjv: And gathered them out of the lands, from the east, and from the west, from the north, and from the south.
verses.bsb: and gathered from the lands, from east and west, from north and south.

verses.kjv: They wandered in the wilderness in a solitary way; they found no city to dwell in.
verses.bsb: Some wandered in desert wastelands, finding no path to a city in which to dwell.

verses.kjv: Hungry and thirsty, their soul fainted in them.
verses.bsb: They were hungry and thirsty; their soul fainted within them.

verses.kjv: Then they cried unto the Lord in their trouble, and he delivered them out of their distresses.
verses.bsb: Then they cried out to the LORD in their trouble, and He delivered them from their distress.

verses.kjv: And he led them forth by the right way, that they might go to a city of habitation.
verses.bsb: He led them on a straight path to reach a city where they could live.

verses.kjv: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!
verses.bsb: Let them give thanks to the LORD for His loving devotion and His wonders to the sons of men.

verses.kjv: For he satisfieth the longing soul, and filleth the hungry soul with goodness.
verses.bsb: For He satisfies the thirsty and fills the hungry with good things.

verses.kjv: Such as sit in darkness and in the shadow of death, being bound in affliction and iron;
verses.bsb: Some sat in darkness and in the shadow of death, prisoners in affliction and chains,

verses.kjv: Because they rebelled against the words of God, and contemned the counsel of the most High:
verses.bsb: because they rebelled against the words of God and despised the counsel of the Most High.

verses.kjv: Therefore he brought down their heart with labour; they fell down, and there was none to help.
verses.bsb: He humbled their hearts with hard labor; they stumbled, and there was no one to help.

verses.kjv: Then they cried unto the Lord in their trouble, and he saved them out of their distresses.
verses.bsb: Then they cried out to the LORD in their trouble, and He saved them from their distress.

verses.kjv: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death, and brake their bands in sunder.
verses.bsb: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death and broke away their chains.

verses.kjv: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!
verses.bsb: Let them give thanks to the LORD for His loving devotion and His wonders to the sons of men.

verses.kjv: For he hath broken the gates of brass, and cut the bars of iron in sunder.
verses.bsb: For He has broken down the gates of bronze and cut through the bars of iron.

verses.kjv: Fools because of their transgression, and because of their iniquities, are afflicted.
verses.bsb: Fools, in their rebellious ways, and through their iniquities, suffered affliction.

verses.kjv: Their soul abhorreth all manner of meat; and they draw near unto the gates of death.
verses.bsb: They loathed all food and drew near to the gates of death.

verses.kjv: Then they cry unto the Lord in their trouble, and he saveth them out of their distresses.
verses.bsb: Then they cried out to the LORD in their trouble, and He saved them from their distress.

verses.kjv: He sent his word, and healed them, and delivered them from their destructions.
verses.bsb: He sent forth His word and healed them; He rescued them from the Pit.

verses.kjv: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!
verses.bsb: Let them give thanks to the LORD for His loving devotion and His wonders to the sons of men.

verses.kjv: And let them sacrifice the sacrifices of thanksgiving, and declare his works with rejoicing.
verses.bsb: Let them offer sacrifices of thanksgiving and declare His works with rejoicing.

verses.kjv: They that go down to the sea in ships, that do business in great waters;
verses.bsb: Others went out to sea in ships, conducting trade on the mighty waters.

verses.kjv: These see the works of the Lord, and his wonders in the deep.
verses.bsb: They saw the works of the LORD, and His wonders in the deep.

verses.kjv: For he commandeth, and raiseth the stormy wind, which lifteth up the waves thereof.
verses.bsb: For He spoke and raised a tempest that lifted the waves of the sea.

verses.kjv: They mount up to the heaven, they go down again to the depths: their soul is melted because of trouble.
verses.bsb: They mounted up to the heavens, then sunk to the depths; their courage melted in their anguish.

verses.kjv: They reel to and fro, and stagger like a drunken man, and are at their wits’ end.
verses.bsb: They reeled and staggered like drunkards, and all their skill was useless.

verses.kjv: Then they cry unto the Lord in their trouble, and he bringeth them out of their distresses.
verses.bsb: Then they cried out to the LORD in their trouble, and He brought them out of their distress.

verses.kjv: He maketh the storm a calm, so that the waves thereof are still.
verses.bsb: He calmed the storm to a whisper, and the waves of the sea were hushed.

verses.kjv: Then are they glad because they be quiet; so he bringeth them unto their desired haven.
verses.bsb: They rejoiced in the silence, and He guided them to the harbor they desired.

verses.kjv: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!
verses.bsb: Let them give thanks to the LORD for His loving devotion and His wonders to the sons of men.

verses.kjv: Let them exalt him also in the congregation of the people, and praise him in the assembly of the elders.
verses.bsb: Let them exalt Him in the assembly of the people and praise Him in the council of the elders.

verses.kjv: He turneth rivers into a wilderness, and the watersprings into dry ground;
verses.bsb: He turns rivers into deserts, springs of water into thirsty ground,

verses.kjv: A fruitful land into barrenness, for the wickedness of them that dwell therein.
verses.bsb: and fruitful land into fields of salt, because of the wickedness of its dwellers.

verses.kjv: He turneth the wilderness into a standing water, and dry ground into watersprings.
verses.bsb: He turns a desert into pools of water and a dry land into flowing springs.

verses.kjv: And there he maketh the hungry to dwell, that they may prepare a city for habitation;
verses.bsb: He causes the hungry to settle there, that they may establish a city in which to dwell.

verses.kjv: And sow the fields, and plant vineyards, which may yield fruits of increase.
verses.bsb: They sow fields and plant vineyards that yield a fruitful harvest.

verses.kjv: He blesseth them also, so that they are multiplied greatly; and suffereth not their cattle to decrease.
verses.bsb: He blesses them, and they multiply greatly; He does not let their herds diminish.

verses.kjv: Again, they are minished and brought low through oppression, affliction, and sorrow.
verses.bsb: When they are decreased and humbled by oppression, evil, and sorrow,

verses.kjv: He poureth contempt upon princes, and causeth them to wander in the wilderness, where there is no way.
verses.bsb: He pours out contempt on the nobles and makes them wander in a trackless wasteland.

verses.kjv: Yet setteth he the poor on high from affliction, and maketh him families like a flock.
verses.bsb: But He lifts the needy from affliction and increases their families like flocks.

verses.kjv: The righteous shall see it, and rejoice: and all iniquity shall stop her mouth.
verses.bsb: The upright see and rejoice, and all iniquity shuts its mouth.

verses.kjv: Whoso is wise, and will observe these things, even they shall understand the lovingkindness of the Lord.
verses.bsb: Let him who is wise pay heed to these things and consider the loving devotion of the LORD.

verses.kjv: O GOD, my heart is fixed; I will sing and give praise, even with my glory.
verses.bsb: My heart is steadfast, O God; I will sing and make music with all my being.

verses.kjv: Awake, psaltery and harp: I myself will awake early.
verses.bsb: Awake, O harp and lyre! I will awaken the dawn.

verses.kjv: I will praise thee, O Lord, among the people: and I will sing praises unto thee among the nations.
verses.bsb: I will praise You, O LORD, among the nations; I will sing Your praises among the peoples.

verses.kjv: For thy mercy is great above the heavens: and thy truth reacheth unto the clouds.
verses.bsb: For Your loving devotion extends beyond the heavens, and Your faithfulness reaches to the clouds.

verses.kjv: Be thou exalted, O God, above the heavens: and thy glory above all the earth;
verses.bsb: Be exalted, O God, above the heavens; may Your glory cover all the earth.

verses.kjv: That thy beloved may be delivered: save with thy right hand, and answer me.
verses.bsb: Respond and save us with Your right hand, that Your beloved may be delivered.

verses.kjv: God hath spoken in his holiness; I will rejoice, I will divide Shechem, and mete out the valley of Succoth.
verses.bsb: God has spoken from His sanctuary: “I will triumph! I will parcel out Shechem and apportion the Valley of Succoth.

verses.kjv: Gilead is mine; Manasseh is mine; Ephraim also is the strength of mine head; Judah is my lawgiver;
verses.bsb: Gilead is Mine, and Manasseh is Mine; Ephraim is My helmet, Judah is My scepter.

verses.kjv: Moab is my washpot; over Edom will I cast out my shoe; over Philistia will I triumph.
verses.bsb: Moab is My washbasin; upon Edom I toss My sandal; over Philistia I shout in triumph.”

verses.kjv: Who will bring me into the strong city? who will lead me into Edom?
verses.bsb: Who will bring me to the fortified city? Who will lead me to Edom?

verses.kjv: Wilt not thou, O God, who hast cast us off? and wilt not thou, O God, go forth with our hosts?
verses.bsb: Have You not rejected us, O God? Will You no longer march out, O God, with our armies?

verses.kjv: Give us help from trouble: for vain is the help of man.
verses.bsb: Give us aid against the enemy, for the help of man is worthless.

verses.kjv: Through God we shall do valiantly: for he it is that shall tread down our enemies.
verses.bsb: With God we will perform with valor, and He will trample our enemies.

verses.kjv: HOLD not thy peace, O God of my praise;
verses.bsb: O God of my praise, be not silent.

verses.kjv: For the mouth of the wicked and the mouth of the deceitful are opened against me: they have spoken against me with a lying tongue.
verses.bsb: For wicked and deceitful mouths open against me; they speak against me with lying tongues.

verses.kjv: They compassed me about also with words of hatred; and fought against me without a cause.
verses.bsb: They surround me with hateful words and attack me without cause.

verses.kjv: For my love they are my adversaries: but I give myself unto prayer.
verses.bsb: In return for my love they accuse me, but I am a man of prayer.

verses.kjv: And they have rewarded me evil for good, and hatred for my love.
verses.bsb: They repay me evil for good, and hatred for my love.

verses.kjv: Set thou a wicked man over him: and let Satan stand at his right hand.
verses.bsb: Set over him a wicked man; let an accuser stand at his right hand.

verses.kjv: When he shall be judged, let him be condemned: and let his prayer become sin.
verses.bsb: When he is tried, let him be found guilty, and may his prayer be regarded as sin.

verses.kjv: Let his days be few; and let another take his office.
verses.bsb: May his days be few; may another take his position.

verses.kjv: Let his children be fatherless, and his wife a widow.
verses.bsb: May his children be fatherless and his wife a widow.

verses.kjv: Let his children be continually vagabonds, and beg: let them seek their bread also out of their desolate places.
verses.bsb: May his children wander as beggars, seeking sustenance far from their ruined homes.

verses.kjv: Let the extortioner catch all that he hath; and let the strangers spoil his labour.
verses.bsb: May the creditor seize all he owns, and strangers plunder the fruits of his labor.

verses.kjv: Let there be none to extend mercy unto him: neither let there be any to favour his fatherless children.
verses.bsb: May there be no one to extend kindness to him, and no one to favor his fatherless children.

verses.kjv: Let his posterity be cut off; and in the generation following let their name be blotted out.
verses.bsb: May his descendants be cut off; may their name be blotted out from the next generation.

verses.kjv: Let the iniquity of his fathers be remembered with the Lord; and let not the sin of his mother be blotted out.
verses.bsb: May the iniquity of his fathers be remembered before the LORD, and the sin of his mother never be blotted out.

verses.kjv: Let them be before the Lord continually, that he may cut off the memory of them from the earth.
verses.bsb: May their sins always remain before the LORD, that He may cut off their memory from the earth.

verses.kjv: Because that he remembered not to shew mercy, but persecuted the poor and needy man, that he might even slay the broken in heart.
verses.bsb: For he never thought to show kindness, but pursued the poor and needy and brokenhearted, even to their death.

verses.kjv: As he loved cursing, so let it come unto him: as he delighted not in blessing, so let it be far from him.
verses.bsb: The cursing that he loved, may it fall on him; the blessing in which he refused to delight, may it be far from him.

verses.kjv: As he clothed himself with cursing like as with his garment, so let it come into his bowels like water, and like oil into his bones.
verses.bsb: The cursing that he wore like a coat, may it soak into his body like water, and into his bones like oil.

verses.kjv: Let it be unto him as the garment which covereth him, and for a girdle wherewith he is girded continually.
verses.bsb: May it be like a robe wrapped about him, like a belt tied forever around him.

verses.kjv: Let this be the reward of mine adversaries from the Lord, and of them that speak evil against my soul.
verses.bsb: May this be the LORD’s reward to my accusers, to those who speak evil against me.

verses.kjv: But do thou for me, O God the Lord, for thy name’s sake: because thy mercy is good, deliver thou me.
verses.bsb: But You, O GOD, the Lord, deal kindly with me for the sake of Your name; deliver me by the goodness of Your loving devotion.

verses.kjv: For I am poor and needy, and my heart is wounded within me.
verses.bsb: For I am poor and needy; my heart is wounded within me.

verses.kjv: I am gone like the shadow when it declineth: I am tossed up and down as the locust.
verses.bsb: I am fading away like a lengthening shadow; I am shaken off like a locust.

verses.kjv: My knees are weak through fasting; and my flesh faileth of fatness.
verses.bsb: My knees are weak from fasting, and my body grows lean and gaunt.

verses.kjv: I became also a reproach unto them: when they looked upon me they shaked their heads.
verses.bsb: I am an object of scorn to my accusers; when they see me, they shake their heads.

verses.kjv: Help me, O Lord my God: O save me according to thy mercy:
verses.bsb: Help me, O LORD my God; save me according to Your loving devotion.

verses.kjv: That they may know that this is thy hand; that thou, Lord, hast done it.
verses.bsb: Let them know that this is Your hand, that You, O LORD, have done it.

verses.kjv: Let them curse, but bless thou: when they arise, let them be ashamed; but let thy servant rejoice.
verses.bsb: Though they curse, You will bless. When they rise up, they will be put to shame, but Your servant will rejoice.

verses.kjv: Let mine adversaries be clothed with shame, and let them cover themselves with their own confusion, as with a mantle.
verses.bsb: May my accusers be clothed with disgrace; may they wear their shame like a robe.

verses.kjv: I will greatly praise the Lord with my mouth; yea, I will praise him among the multitude.
verses.bsb: With my mouth I will thank the LORD profusely; I will praise Him in the presence of many.

verses.kjv: For he shall stand at the right hand of the poor, to save him from those that condemn his soul.
verses.bsb: For He stands at the right hand of the needy one, to save him from the condemners of his soul.

verses.kjv: THE Lord said unto my Lord, Sit thou at my right hand, until I make thine enemies thy footstool.
verses.bsb: The LORD said to my Lord: “Sit at My right hand until I make Your enemies a footstool for Your feet.”

verses.kjv: The Lord shall send the rod of thy strength out of Zion: rule thou in the midst of thine enemies.
verses.bsb: The LORD extends Your mighty scepter from Zion: “Rule in the midst of Your enemies.”

verses.kjv: Thy people shall be willing in the day of thy power, in the beauties of holiness from the womb of the morning: thou hast the dew of thy youth.
verses.bsb: Your people shall be willing on Your day of battle. Arrayed in holy splendor, from the womb of the dawn, to You belongs the dew of Your youth.

verses.kjv: The Lord hath sworn, and will not repent, Thou art a priest for ever after the order of Melchizedek.
verses.bsb: The LORD has sworn and will not change His mind: “You are a priest forever in the order of Melchizedek.”

verses.kjv: The Lord at thy right hand shall strike through kings in the day of his wrath.
verses.bsb: The Lord is at Your right hand; He will crush kings in the day of His wrath.

verses.kjv: He shall judge among the heathen, he shall fill the places with the dead bodies; he shall wound the heads over many countries.
verses.bsb: He will judge the nations, heaping up the dead; He will crush the leaders far and wide.

verses.kjv: He shall drink of the brook in the way: therefore shall he lift up the head.
verses.bsb: He will drink from the brook by the road; therefore He will lift up His head.

verses.kjv: PRAISE ye the Lord. I will praise the Lord with my whole heart, in the assembly of the upright, and in the congregation.
verses.bsb: Hallelujah!   I will give thanks to the LORD with all my heart in the council of the upright and in the assembly.

verses.kjv: The works of the Lord are great, sought out of all them that have pleasure therein.
verses.bsb: Great are the works of the LORD; they are pondered by all who delight in them.

verses.kjv: His work is honourable and glorious: and his righteousness endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: Splendid and majestic is His work; His righteousness endures forever.

verses.kjv: He hath made his wonderful works to be remembered: the Lord is gracious and full of compassion.
verses.bsb: He has caused His wonders to be remembered; the LORD is gracious and compassionate.

verses.kjv: He hath given meat unto them that fear him: he will ever be mindful of his covenant.
verses.bsb: He provides food for those who fear Him; He remembers His covenant forever.

verses.kjv: He hath shewed his people the power of his works, that he may give them the heritage of the heathen.
verses.bsb: He has shown His people the power of His works by giving them the inheritance of the nations.

verses.kjv: The works of his hands are verity and judgment; all his commandments are sure.
verses.bsb: The works of His hands are truth and justice; all His precepts are trustworthy.

verses.kjv: They stand fast for ever and ever, and are done in truth and uprightness.
verses.bsb: They are upheld forever and ever, enacted in truth and uprightness.

verses.kjv: He sent redemption unto his people: he hath commanded his covenant for ever: holy and reverend is his name.
verses.bsb: He has sent redemption to His people; He has ordained His covenant forever; holy and awesome is His name.

verses.kjv: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom: a good understanding have all they that do his commandments: his praise endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom; all who follow His precepts gain rich understanding.   His praise endures forever!

verses.kjv: PRAISE ye the Lord. Blessed is the man that feareth the Lord, that delighteth greatly in his commandments.
verses.bsb: Hallelujah!   Blessed is the man who fears the LORD, who greatly delights in His commandments.

verses.kjv: His seed shall be mighty upon earth: the generation of the upright shall be blessed.
verses.bsb: His descendants will be mighty in the land; the generation of the upright will be blessed.

verses.kjv: Wealth and riches shall be in his house: and his righteousness endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: Wealth and riches are in his house, and his righteousness endures forever.

verses.kjv: Unto the upright there ariseth light in the darkness: he is gracious, and full of compassion, and righteous.
verses.bsb: Light dawns in the darkness for the upright— for the gracious, compassionate, and righteous.

verses.kjv: A good man sheweth favour, and lendeth: he will guide his affairs with discretion.
verses.bsb: It is well with the man who is generous and lends freely, whose affairs are guided by justice.

verses.kjv: Surely he shall not be moved for ever: the righteous shall be in everlasting remembrance.
verses.bsb: Surely he will never be shaken; the righteous man will be remembered forever.

verses.kjv: He shall not be afraid of evil tidings: his heart is fixed, trusting in the Lord.
verses.bsb: He does not fear bad news; his heart is steadfast, trusting in the LORD.

verses.kjv: His heart is established, he shall not be afraid, until he see his desire upon his enemies.
verses.bsb: His heart is assured; he does not fear, until he looks in triumph on his foes.

verses.kjv: He hath dispersed, he hath given to the poor; his righteousness endureth for ever; his horn shall be exalted with honour.
verses.bsb: He has scattered abroad his gifts to the poor; his righteousness endures forever; his horn will be lifted high in honor.

verses.kjv: The wicked shall see it, and be grieved; he shall gnash with his teeth, and melt away: the desire of the wicked shall perish.
verses.bsb: The wicked man will see and be grieved; he will gnash his teeth and waste away; the desires of the wicked will perish.

verses.kjv: PRAISE ye the Lord. Praise, O ye servants of the Lord, praise the name of the Lord.
verses.bsb: Hallelujah!   Give praise, O servants of the LORD; praise the name of the LORD.

verses.kjv: Blessed be the name of the Lord from this time forth and for evermore.
verses.bsb: Blessed be the name of the LORD both now and forevermore.

verses.kjv: From the rising of the sun unto the going down of the same the Lord’s name is to be praised.
verses.bsb: From where the sun rises to where it sets, the name of the LORD is praised.

verses.kjv: The Lord is high above all nations, and his glory above the heavens.
verses.bsb: The LORD is exalted over all the nations, His glory above the heavens.

verses.kjv: Who is like unto the Lord our God, who dwelleth on high,
verses.bsb: Who is like the LORD our God, the One enthroned on high?

verses.kjv: Who humbleth himself to behold the things that are in heaven, and in the earth!
verses.bsb: He humbles Himself to behold the heavens and the earth.

verses.kjv: He raiseth up the poor out of the dust, and lifteth the needy out of the dunghill;
verses.bsb: He raises the poor from the dust and lifts the needy from the dump

verses.kjv: That he may set him with princes, even with the princes of his people.
verses.bsb: to seat them with nobles, with the princes of His people.

verses.kjv: He maketh the barren woman to keep house, and to be a joyful mother of children. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.bsb: He settles the barren woman in her home as a joyful mother to her children.   Hallelujah!

verses.kjv: WHEN Israel went out of Egypt, the house of Jacob from a people of strange language;
verses.bsb: When Israel departed from Egypt, the house of Jacob from a people of foreign tongue,

verses.kjv: Judah was his sanctuary, and Israel his dominion.
verses.bsb: Judah became God’s sanctuary, and Israel His dominion.

verses.kjv: The sea saw it, and fled: Jordan was driven back.
verses.bsb: The sea observed and fled; the Jordan turned back;

verses.kjv: The mountains skipped like rams, and the little hills like lambs.
verses.bsb: the mountains skipped like rams, the hills like lambs.

verses.kjv: What ailed thee, O thou sea, that thou fleddest? thou Jordan, that thou wast driven back?
verses.bsb: Why was it, O sea, that you fled, O Jordan, that you turned back,

verses.kjv: Ye mountains, that ye skipped like rams; and ye little hills, like lambs?
verses.bsb: O mountains, that you skipped like rams, O hills, like lambs?

verses.kjv: Tremble, thou earth, at the presence of the Lord, at the presence of the God of Jacob;
verses.bsb: Tremble, O earth, at the presence of the Lord, at the presence of the God of Jacob,

verses.kjv: Which turned the rock into a standing water, the flint into a fountain of waters.
verses.bsb: who turned the rock into a pool, the flint into a fountain of water!

verses.kjv: NOT unto us, O Lord, not unto us, but unto thy name give glory, for thy mercy, and for thy truth’s sake.
verses.bsb: Not to us, O LORD, not to us, but to Your name be the glory, because of Your loving devotion, because of Your faithfulness.

verses.kjv: Wherefore should the heathen say, Where is now their God?
verses.bsb: Why should the nations say, “Where is their God?”

verses.kjv: But our God is in the heavens: he hath done whatsoever he hath pleased.
verses.bsb: Our God is in heaven; He does as He pleases.

verses.kjv: Their idols are silver and gold, the work of men’s hands.
verses.bsb: Their idols are silver and gold, made by the hands of men.

verses.kjv: They have mouths, but they speak not: eyes have they, but they see not:
verses.bsb: They have mouths, but cannot speak; they have eyes, but cannot see;

verses.kjv: They have ears, but they hear not: noses have they, but they smell not:
verses.bsb: they have ears, but cannot hear; they have noses, but cannot smell;

verses.kjv: They have hands, but they handle not: feet have they, but they walk not: neither speak they through their throat.
verses.bsb: they have hands, but cannot feel; they have feet, but cannot walk; they cannot even clear their throats.

verses.kjv: They that make them are like unto them; so is every one that trusteth in them.
verses.bsb: Those who make them become like them, as do all who trust in them.

verses.kjv: O Israel, trust thou in the Lord: he is their help and their shield.
verses.bsb: O Israel, trust in the LORD! He is their help and shield.

verses.kjv: O house of Aaron, trust in the Lord: he is their help and their shield.
verses.bsb: O house of Aaron, trust in the LORD! He is their help and shield.

verses.kjv: Ye that fear the Lord, trust in the Lord: he is their help and their shield.
verses.bsb: You who fear the LORD, trust in the LORD! He is their help and shield.

verses.kjv: The Lord hath been mindful of us: he will bless us; he will bless the house of Israel; he will bless the house of Aaron.
verses.bsb: The LORD is mindful of us; He will bless us. He will bless the house of Israel; He will bless the house of Aaron;

verses.kjv: He will bless them that fear the Lord, both small and great.
verses.bsb: He will bless those who fear the LORD— small and great alike.

verses.kjv: The Lord shall increase you more and more, you and your children.
verses.bsb: May the LORD give you increase, both you and your children.

verses.kjv: Ye are blessed of the Lord which made heaven and earth.
verses.bsb: May you be blessed by the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth.

verses.kjv: The heaven, even the heavens, are the Lord’s: but the earth hath he given to the children of men.
verses.bsb: The highest heavens belong to the LORD, but the earth He has given to mankind.

verses.kjv: The dead praise not the Lord, neither any that go down into silence.
verses.bsb: It is not the dead who praise the LORD, nor any who descend into silence.

verses.kjv: But we will bless the Lord from this time forth and for evermore. Praise the Lord.
verses.bsb: But it is we who will bless the LORD, both now and forevermore.   Hallelujah!

verses.kjv: I LOVE the Lord, because he hath heard my voice and my supplications.
verses.bsb: I love the LORD, for He has heard my voice— my appeal for mercy.

verses.kjv: Because he hath inclined his ear unto me, therefore will I call upon him as long as I live.
verses.bsb: Because He has inclined His ear to me, I will call on Him as long as I live.

verses.kjv: The sorrows of death compassed me, and the pains of hell gat hold upon me: I found trouble and sorrow.
verses.bsb: The ropes of death entangled me; the anguish of Sheol overcame me; I was confronted by trouble and sorrow.

verses.kjv: Then called I upon the name of the Lord; O Lord, I beseech thee, deliver my soul.
verses.bsb: Then I called on the name of the LORD: “O LORD, deliver my soul!”

verses.kjv: Gracious is the Lord, and righteous; yea, our God is merciful.
verses.bsb: The LORD is gracious and righteous; our God is full of compassion.

verses.kjv: The Lord preserveth the simple: I was brought low, and he helped me.
verses.bsb: The LORD preserves the simplehearted; I was helpless, and He saved me.

verses.kjv: Return unto thy rest, O my soul; for the Lord hath dealt bountifully with thee.
verses.bsb: Return to your rest, O my soul, for the LORD has been good to you.

verses.kjv: For thou hast delivered my soul from death, mine eyes from tears, and my feet from falling.
verses.bsb: For You have delivered my soul from death, my eyes from tears, my feet from stumbling.

verses.kjv: I will walk before the Lord in the land of the living.
verses.bsb: I will walk before the LORD in the land of the living.

verses.kjv: I believed, therefore have I spoken: I was greatly afflicted:
verses.bsb: I believed, therefore I said, “I am greatly afflicted.”

verses.kjv: I said in my haste, All men are liars.
verses.bsb: In my alarm I said, “All men are liars!”

verses.kjv: What shall I render unto the Lord for all his benefits toward me?
verses.bsb: How can I repay the LORD for all His goodness to me?

verses.kjv: I will take the cup of salvation, and call upon the name of the Lord.
verses.bsb: I will lift the cup of salvation and call on the name of the LORD.

verses.kjv: I will pay my vows unto the Lord now in the presence of all his people.
verses.bsb: I will fulfill my vows to the LORD in the presence of all His people.

verses.kjv: Precious in the sight of the Lord is the death of his saints.
verses.bsb: Precious in the sight of the LORD is the death of His saints.

verses.kjv: O Lord, truly I am thy servant; I am thy servant, and the son of thine handmaid: thou hast loosed my bonds.
verses.bsb: Truly, O LORD, I am Your servant; I am Your servant, the son of Your maidservant; You have broken my bonds.

verses.kjv: I will offer to thee the sacrifice of thanksgiving, and will call upon the name of the Lord.
verses.bsb: I will offer to You a sacrifice of thanksgiving and call on the name of the LORD.

verses.kjv: I will pay my vows unto the Lord now in the presence of all his people,
verses.bsb: I will fulfill my vows to the LORD in the presence of all His people,

verses.kjv: In the courts of the Lord’s house, in the midst of thee, O Jerusalem. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.bsb: in the courts of the LORD’s house, in your midst, O Jerusalem.   Hallelujah!

verses.kjv: O PRAISE the Lord, all ye nations: praise him, all ye people.
verses.bsb: Praise the LORD, all you nations! Extol Him, all you peoples!

verses.kjv: For his merciful kindness is great toward us: and the truth of the Lord endureth for ever. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.bsb: For great is His loving devotion toward us, and the faithfulness of the LORD endures forever.   Hallelujah!

verses.kjv: O GIVE thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: because his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: Give thanks to the LORD, for He is good; His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: Let Israel now say, that his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: Let Israel say, “His loving devotion endures forever.”

verses.kjv: Let the house of Aaron now say, that his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: Let the house of Aaron say, “His loving devotion endures forever.”

verses.kjv: Let them now that fear the Lord say, that his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: Let those who fear the LORD say, “His loving devotion endures forever.”

verses.kjv: I called upon the Lord in distress: the Lord answered me, and set me in a large place.
verses.bsb: In my distress I called to the LORD, and He answered and set me free.

verses.kjv: The Lord is on my side; I will not fear: what can man do unto me?
verses.bsb: The LORD is on my side; I will not be afraid. What can man do to me?

verses.kjv: The Lord taketh my part with them that help me: therefore shall I see my desire upon them that hate me.
verses.bsb: The LORD is on my side; He is my helper. Therefore I will look in triumph on those who hate me.

verses.kjv: It is better to trust in the Lord than to put confidence in man.
verses.bsb: It is better to take refuge in the LORD than to trust in man.

verses.kjv: It is better to trust in the Lord than to put confidence in princes.
verses.bsb: It is better to take refuge in the LORD than to trust in princes.

verses.kjv: All nations compassed me about: but in the name of the Lord will I destroy them.
verses.bsb: All the nations surrounded me, but in the name of the LORD I cut them off.

verses.kjv: They compassed me about; yea, they compassed me about: but in the name of the Lord I will destroy them.
verses.bsb: They surrounded me on every side, but in the name of the LORD I cut them off.

verses.kjv: They compassed me about like bees; they are quenched as the fire of thorns: for in the name of the Lord I will destroy them.
verses.bsb: They swarmed around me like bees, but they were extinguished like burning thorns; in the name of the LORD I cut them off.

verses.kjv: Thou hast thrust sore at me that I might fall: but the Lord helped me.
verses.bsb: I was pushed so hard I was falling, but the LORD helped me.

verses.kjv: The Lord is my strength and song, and is become my salvation.
verses.bsb: The LORD is my strength and my song, and He has become my salvation.

verses.kjv: The voice of rejoicing and salvation is in the tabernacles of the righteous: the right hand of the Lord doeth valiantly.
verses.bsb: Shouts of joy and salvation resound in the tents of the righteous: “The right hand of the LORD performs with valor!

verses.kjv: The right hand of the Lord is exalted: the right hand of the Lord doeth valiantly.
verses.bsb: The right hand of the LORD is exalted! The right hand of the LORD performs with valor!”

verses.kjv: I shall not die, but live, and declare the works of the Lord.
verses.bsb: I will not die, but I will live and proclaim what the LORD has done.

verses.kjv: The Lord hath chastened me sore: but he hath not given me over unto death.
verses.bsb: The LORD disciplined me severely, but He has not given me over to death.

verses.kjv: Open to me the gates of righteousness: I will go into them, and I will praise the Lord:
verses.bsb: Open to me the gates of righteousness, that I may enter and give thanks to the LORD.

verses.kjv: This gate of the Lord, into which the righteous shall enter.
verses.bsb: This is the gate of the LORD; the righteous shall enter through it.

verses.kjv: I will praise thee: for thou hast heard me, and art become my salvation.
verses.bsb: I will give You thanks, for You have answered me, and You have become my salvation.

verses.kjv: The stone which the builders refused is become the head stone of the corner.
verses.bsb: The stone the builders rejected has become the cornerstone.

verses.kjv: This is the Lord’s doing; it is marvellous in our eyes.
verses.bsb: This is from the LORD, and it is marvelous in our eyes.

verses.kjv: This is the day which the Lord hath made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.
verses.bsb: This is the day that the LORD has made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.

verses.kjv: Save now, I beseech thee, O Lord: O Lord, I beseech thee, send now prosperity.
verses.bsb: O LORD, save us, we pray. We beseech You, O LORD, cause us to prosper!

verses.kjv: Blessed be he that cometh in the name of the Lord: we have blessed you out of the house of the Lord.
verses.bsb: Blessed is he who comes in the name of the LORD. From the house of the LORD we bless you.

verses.kjv: God is the Lord, which hath shewed us light: bind the sacrifice with cords, even unto the horns of the altar.
verses.bsb: The LORD is God; He has made His light to shine upon us. Bind the festal sacrifice with cords to the horns of the altar.

verses.kjv: Thou art my God, and I will praise thee: thou art my God, I will exalt thee.
verses.bsb: You are my God, and I will give You thanks. You are my God, and I will exalt You.

verses.kjv: O give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: Give thanks to the LORD, for He is good; His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: BLESSED are the undefiled in the way, who walk in the law of the Lord.
verses.bsb: Blessed are those whose way is blameless, who walk in the Law of the LORD.

verses.kjv: Blessed are they that keep his testimonies, and that seek him with the whole heart.
verses.bsb: Blessed are those who keep His testimonies and seek Him with all their heart.

verses.kjv: They also do no iniquity: they walk in his ways.
verses.bsb: They do no iniquity; they walk in His ways.

verses.kjv: Thou hast commanded us to keep thy precepts diligently.
verses.bsb: You have ordained Your precepts, that we should keep them diligently.

verses.kjv: O that my ways were directed to keep thy statutes!
verses.bsb: Oh, that my ways were committed to keeping Your statutes!

verses.kjv: Then shall I not be ashamed, when I have respect unto all thy commandments.
verses.bsb: Then I would not be ashamed when I consider all Your commandments.

verses.kjv: I will praise thee with uprightness of heart, when I shall have learned thy righteous judgments.
verses.bsb: I will praise You with an upright heart when I learn Your righteous judgments.

verses.kjv: I will keep thy statutes: O forsake me not utterly.
