verses.bsb: I will keep Your statutes; do not utterly forsake me.

verses.kjv: Wherewithal shall a young man cleanse his way? by taking heed thereto according to thy word.
verses.bsb: How can a young man keep his way pure? By guarding it according to Your word.

verses.kjv: With my whole heart have I sought thee: O let me not wander from thy commandments.
verses.bsb: With all my heart I have sought You; do not let me stray from Your commandments.

verses.kjv: Thy word have I hid in mine heart, that I might not sin against thee.
verses.bsb: I have hidden Your word in my heart that I might not sin against You.

verses.kjv: Blessed art thou, O Lord: teach me thy statutes.
verses.bsb: Blessed are You, O LORD; teach me Your statutes.

verses.kjv: With my lips have I declared all the judgments of thy mouth.
verses.bsb: With my lips I proclaim all the judgments of Your mouth.

verses.kjv: I have rejoiced in the way of thy testimonies, as much as in all riches.
verses.bsb: I rejoice in the way of Your testimonies as much as in all riches.

verses.kjv: I will meditate in thy precepts, and have respect unto thy ways.
verses.bsb: I will meditate on Your precepts and regard Your ways.

verses.kjv: I will delight myself in thy statutes: I will not forget thy word.
verses.bsb: I will delight in Your statutes; I will not forget Your word.

verses.kjv: Deal bountifully with thy servant, that I may live, and keep thy word.
verses.bsb: Deal bountifully with Your servant, that I may live and keep Your word.

verses.kjv: Open thou mine eyes, that I may behold wondrous things out of thy law.
verses.bsb: Open my eyes that I may see wondrous things from Your law.

verses.kjv: I am a stranger in the earth: hide not thy commandments from me.
verses.bsb: I am a stranger on the earth; do not hide Your commandments from me.

verses.kjv: My soul breaketh for the longing that it hath unto thy judgments at all times.
verses.bsb: My soul is consumed with longing for Your judgments at all times.

verses.kjv: Thou hast rebuked the proud that are cursed, which do err from thy commandments.
verses.bsb: You rebuke the arrogant— the cursed who stray from Your commandments.

verses.kjv: Remove from me reproach and contempt; for I have kept thy testimonies.
verses.bsb: Remove my scorn and contempt, for I have kept Your testimonies.

verses.kjv: Princes also did sit and speak against me: but thy servant did meditate in thy statutes.
verses.bsb: Though rulers sit and slander me, Your servant meditates on Your statutes.

verses.kjv: Thy testimonies also are my delight and my counsellers.
verses.bsb: Your testimonies are indeed my delight; they are my counselors.

verses.kjv: My soul cleaveth unto the dust: quicken thou me according to thy word.
verses.bsb: My soul cleaves to the dust; revive me according to Your word.

verses.kjv: I have declared my ways, and thou heardest me: teach me thy statutes.
verses.bsb: I recounted my ways, and You answered me; teach me Your statutes.

verses.kjv: Make me to understand the way of thy precepts: so shall I talk of thy wondrous works.
verses.bsb: Make clear to me the way of Your precepts; then I will meditate on Your wonders.

verses.kjv: My soul melteth for heaviness: strengthen thou me according unto thy word.
verses.bsb: My soul melts with sorrow; strengthen me according to Your word.

verses.kjv: Remove from me the way of lying: and grant me thy law graciously.
verses.bsb: Remove me from the path of deceit and graciously grant me Your law.

verses.kjv: I have chosen the way of truth: thy judgments have I laid before me.
verses.bsb: I have chosen the way of truth; I have set Your ordinances before me.

verses.kjv: I have stuck unto thy testimonies: O Lord, put me not to shame.
verses.bsb: I cling to Your testimonies, O LORD; let me not be put to shame.

verses.kjv: I will run the way of thy commandments, when thou shalt enlarge my heart.
verses.bsb: I run in the path of Your commandments, for You will enlarge my heart.

verses.kjv: Teach me, O Lord, the way of thy statutes; and I shall keep it unto the end.
verses.bsb: Teach me, O LORD, the way of Your statutes, and I will keep them to the end.

verses.kjv: Give me understanding, and I shall keep thy law; yea, I shall observe it with my whole heart.
verses.bsb: Give me understanding that I may obey Your law, and follow it with all my heart.

verses.kjv: Make me to go in the path of thy commandments; for therein do I delight.
verses.bsb: Direct me in the path of Your commandments, for there I find delight.

verses.kjv: Incline my heart unto thy testimonies, and not to covetousness.
verses.bsb: Turn my heart to Your testimonies and not to covetous gain.

verses.kjv: Turn away mine eyes from beholding vanity; and quicken thou me in thy way.
verses.bsb: Turn my eyes away from worthless things; revive me with Your word.

verses.kjv: Stablish thy word unto thy servant, who is devoted to thy fear.
verses.bsb: Establish Your word to Your servant, to produce reverence for You.

verses.kjv: Turn away my reproach which I fear: for thy judgments are good.
verses.bsb: Turn away the disgrace I dread, for Your judgments are good.

verses.kjv: Behold, I have longed after thy precepts: quicken me in thy righteousness.
verses.bsb: How I long for Your precepts! Revive me in Your righteousness.

verses.kjv: Let thy mercies come also unto me, O Lord, even thy salvation, according to thy word.
verses.bsb: May Your loving devotion come to me, O LORD, Your salvation, according to Your promise.

verses.kjv: So shall I have wherewith to answer him that reproacheth me: for I trust in thy word.
verses.bsb: Then I can answer him who taunts, for I trust in Your word.

verses.kjv: And take not the word of truth utterly out of my mouth; for I have hoped in thy judgments.
verses.bsb: Never take Your word of truth from my mouth, for I hope in Your judgments.

verses.kjv: So shall I keep thy law continually for ever and ever.
verses.bsb: I will always obey Your law, forever and ever.

verses.kjv: And I will walk at liberty: for I seek thy precepts.
verses.bsb: And I will walk in freedom, for I have sought Your precepts.

verses.kjv: I will speak of thy testimonies also before kings, and will not be ashamed.
verses.bsb: I will speak of Your testimonies before kings, and I will not be ashamed.

verses.kjv: And I will delight myself in thy commandments, which I have loved.
verses.bsb: I delight in Your commandments because I love them.

verses.kjv: My hands also will I lift up unto thy commandments, which I have loved; and I will meditate in thy statutes.
verses.bsb: I lift up my hands to Your commandments, which I love, and I meditate on Your statutes.

verses.kjv: Remember the word unto thy servant, upon which thou hast caused me to hope.
verses.bsb: Remember Your word to Your servant, upon which You have given me hope.

verses.kjv: This is my comfort in my affliction: for thy word hath quickened me.
verses.bsb: This is my comfort in affliction, that Your promise has given me life.

verses.kjv: The proud have had me greatly in derision: yet have I not declined from thy law.
verses.bsb: The arrogant utterly deride me, but I do not turn from Your law.

verses.kjv: I remembered thy judgments of old, O Lord; and have comforted myself.
verses.bsb: I remember Your judgments of old, O LORD, and in them I find comfort.

verses.kjv: Horror hath taken hold upon me because of the wicked that forsake thy law.
verses.bsb: Rage has taken hold of me because of the wicked who reject Your law.

verses.kjv: Thy statutes have been my songs in the house of my pilgrimage.
verses.bsb: Your statutes are songs to me in the house of my pilgrimage.

verses.kjv: I have remembered thy name, O Lord, in the night, and have kept thy law.
verses.bsb: In the night, O LORD, I remember Your name, that I may keep Your law.

verses.kjv: This I had, because I kept thy precepts.
verses.bsb: This is my practice, for I obey Your precepts.

verses.kjv: Thou art my portion, O Lord: I have said that I would keep thy words.
verses.bsb: The LORD is my portion; I have promised to keep Your words.

verses.kjv: I intreated thy favour with my whole heart: be merciful unto me according to thy word.
verses.bsb: I have sought Your face with all my heart; be gracious to me according to Your promise.

verses.kjv: I thought on my ways, and turned my feet unto thy testimonies.
verses.bsb: I considered my ways and turned my steps to Your testimonies.

verses.kjv: I made haste, and delayed not to keep thy commandments.
verses.bsb: I hurried without hesitating to keep Your commandments.

verses.kjv: The bands of the wicked have robbed me: but I have not forgotten thy law.
verses.bsb: Though the ropes of the wicked bind me, I do not forget Your law.

verses.kjv: At midnight I will rise to give thanks unto thee because of thy righteous judgments.
verses.bsb: At midnight I rise to give You thanks for Your righteous judgments.

verses.kjv: I am a companion of all them that fear thee, and of them that keep thy precepts.
verses.bsb: I am a friend to all who fear You, and to those who keep Your precepts.

verses.kjv: The earth, O Lord, is full of thy mercy: teach me thy statutes.
verses.bsb: The earth is filled with Your loving devotion, O LORD; teach me Your statutes.

verses.kjv: Thou hast dealt well with thy servant, O Lord, according unto thy word.
verses.bsb: You are good to Your servant, O LORD, according to Your word.

verses.kjv: Teach me good judgment and knowledge: for I have believed thy commandments.
verses.bsb: Teach me good judgment and knowledge, for I believe in Your commandments.

verses.kjv: Before I was afflicted I went astray: but now have I kept thy word.
verses.bsb: Before I was afflicted, I went astray; but now I keep Your word.

verses.kjv: Thou art good, and doest good; teach me thy statutes.
verses.bsb: You are good, and You do what is good; teach me Your statutes.

verses.kjv: The proud have forged a lie against me: but I will keep thy precepts with my whole heart.
verses.bsb: Though the arrogant have smeared me with lies, I keep Your precepts with all my heart.

verses.kjv: Their heart is as fat as grease; but I delight in thy law.
verses.bsb: Their hearts are hard and callous, but I delight in Your law.

verses.kjv: It is good for me that I have been afflicted; that I might learn thy statutes.
verses.bsb: It was good for me to be afflicted, that I might learn Your statutes.

verses.kjv: The law of thy mouth is better unto me than thousands of gold and silver.
verses.bsb: The law from Your mouth is more precious to me than thousands of pieces of gold and silver.

verses.kjv: Thy hands have made me and fashioned me: give me understanding, that I may learn thy commandments.
verses.bsb: Your hands have made me and fashioned me; give me understanding to learn Your commandments.

verses.kjv: They that fear thee will be glad when they see me; because I have hoped in thy word.
verses.bsb: May those who fear You see me and rejoice, for I have hoped in Your word.

verses.kjv: I know, O Lord, that thy judgments are right, and that thou in faithfulness hast afflicted me.
verses.bsb: I know, O LORD, that Your judgments are righteous, and that in faithfulness You have afflicted me.

verses.kjv: Let, I pray thee, thy merciful kindness be for my comfort, according to thy word unto thy servant.
verses.bsb: May Your loving devotion comfort me, I pray, according to Your promise to Your servant.

verses.kjv: Let thy tender mercies come unto me, that I may live: for thy law is my delight.
verses.bsb: May Your compassion come to me, that I may live, for Your law is my delight.

verses.kjv: Let the proud be ashamed; for they dealt perversely with me without a cause: but I will meditate in thy precepts.
verses.bsb: May the arrogant be put to shame for subverting me with a lie; I will meditate on Your precepts.

verses.kjv: Let those that fear thee turn unto me, and those that have known thy testimonies.
verses.bsb: May those who fear You turn to me, those who know Your testimonies.

verses.kjv: Let my heart be sound in thy statutes; that I be not ashamed.
verses.bsb: May my heart be blameless in Your statutes, that I may not be put to shame.

verses.kjv: My soul fainteth for thy salvation: but I hope in thy word.
verses.bsb: My soul faints for Your salvation; I wait for Your word.

verses.kjv: Mine eyes fail for thy word, saying, When wilt thou comfort me?
verses.bsb: My eyes fail, looking for Your promise; I ask, “When will You comfort me?”

verses.kjv: For I am become like a bottle in the smoke; yet do I not forget thy statutes.
verses.bsb: Though I am like a wineskin dried up by smoke, I do not forget Your statutes.

verses.kjv: How many are the days of thy servant? when wilt thou execute judgment on them that persecute me?
verses.bsb: How many days must Your servant wait? When will You execute judgment on my persecutors?

verses.kjv: The proud have digged pits for me, which are not after thy law.
verses.bsb: The arrogant have dug pits for me in violation of Your law.

verses.kjv: All thy commandments are faithful: they persecute me wrongfully; help thou me.
verses.bsb: All Your commandments are faithful; I am persecuted without cause—help me!

verses.kjv: They had almost consumed me upon earth; but I forsook not thy precepts.
verses.bsb: They almost wiped me from the earth, but I have not forsaken Your precepts.

verses.kjv: Quicken me after thy lovingkindness; so shall I keep the testimony of thy mouth.
verses.bsb: Revive me according to Your loving devotion, that I may obey the testimony of Your mouth.

verses.kjv: For ever, O Lord, thy word is settled in heaven.
verses.bsb: Your word, O LORD, is everlasting; it is firmly fixed in the heavens.

verses.kjv: Thy faithfulness is unto all generations: thou hast established the earth, and it abideth.
verses.bsb: Your faithfulness continues through all generations; You established the earth, and it endures.

verses.kjv: They continue this day according to thine ordinances: for all are thy servants.
verses.bsb: Your ordinances stand to this day, for all things are servants to You.

verses.kjv: Unless thy law had been my delights, I should then have perished in mine affliction.
verses.bsb: If Your law had not been my delight, then I would have perished in my affliction.

verses.kjv: I will never forget thy precepts: for with them thou hast quickened me.
verses.bsb: I will never forget Your precepts, for by them You have revived me.

verses.kjv: I am thine, save me; for I have sought thy precepts.
verses.bsb: I am Yours; save me, for I have sought Your precepts.

verses.kjv: The wicked have waited for me to destroy me: but I will consider thy testimonies.
verses.bsb: The wicked wait to destroy me, but I will ponder Your testimonies.

verses.kjv: I have seen an end of all perfection: but thy commandment is exceeding broad.
verses.bsb: I have seen a limit to all perfection, but Your commandment is without limit.

verses.kjv: O how love I thy law! it is my meditation all the day.
verses.bsb: Oh, how I love Your law! All day long it is my meditation.

verses.kjv: Thou through thy commandments hast made me wiser than mine enemies: for they are ever with me.
verses.bsb: Your commandments make me wiser than my enemies, for they are always with me.

verses.kjv: I have more understanding than all my teachers: for thy testimonies are my meditation.
verses.bsb: I have more insight than all my teachers, for Your testimonies are my meditation.

verses.kjv: I understand more than the ancients, because I keep thy precepts.
verses.bsb: I discern more than the elders, for I obey Your precepts.

verses.kjv: I have refrained my feet from every evil way, that I might keep thy word.
verses.bsb: I have kept my feet from every evil path, that I may keep Your word.

verses.kjv: I have not departed from thy judgments: for thou hast taught me.
verses.bsb: I have not departed from Your ordinances, for You Yourself have taught me.

verses.kjv: How sweet are thy words unto my taste! yea, sweeter than honey to my mouth!
verses.bsb: How sweet are Your words to my taste— sweeter than honey in my mouth!

verses.kjv: Through thy precepts I get understanding: therefore I hate every false way.
verses.bsb: I gain understanding from Your precepts; therefore I hate every false way.

verses.kjv: Thy word is a lamp unto my feet, and a light unto my path.
verses.bsb: Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.

verses.kjv: I have sworn, and I will perform it, that I will keep thy righteous judgments.
verses.bsb: I have sworn and confirmed that I will keep Your righteous judgments.

verses.kjv: I am afflicted very much: quicken me, O Lord, according unto thy word.
verses.bsb: I am severely afflicted, O LORD; revive me through Your word.

verses.kjv: Accept, I beseech thee, the freewill offerings of my mouth, O Lord, and teach me thy judgments.
verses.bsb: Accept the freewill offerings of my mouth, O LORD, and teach me Your judgments.

verses.kjv: My soul is continually in my hand: yet do I not forget thy law.
verses.bsb: I constantly take my life in my hands, yet I do not forget Your law.

verses.kjv: The wicked have laid a snare for me: yet I erred not from thy precepts.
verses.bsb: The wicked have set a snare for me, but I have not strayed from Your precepts.

verses.kjv: Thy testimonies have I taken as an heritage for ever: for they are the rejoicing of my heart.
verses.bsb: Your testimonies are my heritage forever, for they are the joy of my heart.

verses.kjv: I have inclined mine heart to perform thy statutes alway, even unto the end.
verses.bsb: I have inclined my heart to perform Your statutes, even to the very end.

verses.kjv: I hate vain thoughts: but thy law do I love.
verses.bsb: The double-minded I despise, but Your law I love.

verses.kjv: Thou art my hiding place and my shield: I hope in thy word.
verses.bsb: You are my hiding place and my shield; I put my hope in Your word.

verses.kjv: Depart from me, ye evildoers: for I will keep the commandments of my God.
verses.bsb: Depart from me, you evildoers, that I may obey the commandments of my God.

verses.kjv: Uphold me according unto thy word, that I may live: and let me not be ashamed of my hope.
verses.bsb: Sustain me as You promised, that I may live; let me not be ashamed of my hope.

verses.kjv: Hold thou me up, and I shall be safe: and I will have respect unto thy statutes continually.
verses.bsb: Uphold me, and I will be saved, that I may always regard Your statutes.

verses.kjv: Thou hast trodden down all them that err from thy statutes: for their deceit is falsehood.
verses.bsb: You reject all who stray from Your statutes, for their deceitfulness is in vain.

verses.kjv: Thou puttest away all the wicked of the earth like dross: therefore I love thy testimonies.
verses.bsb: All the wicked on earth You discard like dross; therefore I love Your testimonies.

verses.kjv: My flesh trembleth for fear of thee; and I am afraid of thy judgments. AIN.
verses.bsb: My flesh trembles in awe of You; I stand in fear of Your judgments.

verses.kjv: I have done judgment and justice: leave me not to mine oppressors.
verses.bsb: I have done what is just and right; do not leave me to my oppressors.

verses.kjv: Be surety for thy servant for good: let not the proud oppress me.
verses.bsb: Ensure Your servant’s well-being; do not let the arrogant oppress me.

verses.kjv: Mine eyes fail for thy salvation, and for the word of thy righteousness.
verses.bsb: My eyes fail, looking for Your salvation, and for Your righteous promise.

verses.kjv: Deal with thy servant according unto thy mercy, and teach me thy statutes.
verses.bsb: Deal with Your servant according to Your loving devotion, and teach me Your statutes.

verses.kjv: I am thy servant; give me understanding, that I may know thy testimonies.
verses.bsb: I am Your servant; give me understanding, that I may know Your testimonies.

verses.kjv: It is time for thee, Lord, to work: for they have made void thy law.
verses.bsb: It is time for the LORD to act, for they have broken Your law.

verses.kjv: Therefore I love thy commandments above gold; yea, above fine gold.
verses.bsb: Therefore I love Your commandments more than gold, even the purest gold.

verses.kjv: Therefore I esteem all thy precepts concerning all things to be right; and I hate every false way.
verses.bsb: Therefore I admire all Your precepts and hate every false way.

verses.kjv: Thy testimonies are wonderful: therefore doth my soul keep them.
verses.bsb: Wonderful are Your testimonies; therefore I obey them.

verses.kjv: The entrance of thy words giveth light; it giveth understanding unto the simple.
verses.bsb: The unfolding of Your words gives light; it informs the simple.

verses.kjv: I opened my mouth, and panted: for I longed for thy commandments.
verses.bsb: I open my mouth and pant, longing for Your commandments.

verses.kjv: Look thou upon me, and be merciful unto me, as thou usest to do unto those that love thy name.
verses.bsb: Turn to me and show me mercy, as You do to those who love Your name.

verses.kjv: Order my steps in thy word: and let not any iniquity have dominion over me.
verses.bsb: Order my steps in Your word; let no sin rule over me.

verses.kjv: Deliver me from the oppression of man: so will I keep thy precepts.
verses.bsb: Redeem me from the oppression of man, that I may keep Your precepts.

verses.kjv: Make thy face to shine upon thy servant; and teach me thy statutes.
verses.bsb: Make Your face shine upon Your servant, and teach me Your statutes.

verses.kjv: Rivers of waters run down mine eyes, because they keep not thy law.
verses.bsb: My eyes shed streams of tears because Your law is not obeyed.

verses.kjv: Righteous art thou, O Lord, and upright are thy judgments.
verses.bsb: Righteous are You, O LORD, and upright are Your judgments.

verses.kjv: Thy testimonies that thou hast commanded are righteous and very faithful.
verses.bsb: The testimonies You have laid down are righteous and altogether faithful.

verses.kjv: My zeal hath consumed me, because mine enemies have forgotten thy words.
verses.bsb: My zeal has consumed me because my foes forget Your words.

verses.kjv: Thy word is very pure: therefore thy servant loveth it.
verses.bsb: Your promise is completely pure; therefore Your servant loves it.

verses.kjv: I am small and despised: yet do not I forget thy precepts.
verses.bsb: I am lowly and despised, but I do not forget Your precepts.

verses.kjv: Thy righteousness is an everlasting righteousness, and thy law is the truth.
verses.bsb: Your righteousness is everlasting and Your law is true.

verses.kjv: Trouble and anguish have taken hold on me: yet thy commandments are my delights.
verses.bsb: Trouble and distress have found me, but Your commandments are my delight.

verses.kjv: The righteousness of thy testimonies is everlasting: give me understanding, and I shall live.
verses.bsb: Your testimonies are righteous forever. Give me understanding, that I may live.

verses.kjv: I cried with my whole heart; hear me, O Lord: I will keep thy statutes.
verses.bsb: I call with all my heart; answer me, O LORD! I will obey Your statutes.

verses.kjv: I cried unto thee; save me, and I shall keep thy testimonies.
verses.bsb: I call to You; save me, that I may keep Your testimonies.

verses.kjv: I prevented the dawning of the morning, and cried: I hoped in thy word.
verses.bsb: I rise before dawn and cry for help; in Your word I have put my hope.

verses.kjv: Mine eyes prevent the night watches, that I might meditate in thy word.
verses.bsb: My eyes anticipate the watches of night, that I may meditate on Your word.

verses.kjv: Hear my voice according unto thy lovingkindness: O Lord, quicken me according to thy judgment.
verses.bsb: Hear my voice, O LORD, according to Your loving devotion; give me life according to Your justice.

verses.kjv: They draw nigh that follow after mischief: they are far from thy law.
verses.bsb: Those who follow after wickedness draw near; they are far from Your law.

verses.kjv: Thou art near, O Lord; and all thy commandments are truth.
verses.bsb: You are near, O LORD, and all Your commandments are true.

verses.kjv: Concerning thy testimonies, I have known of old that thou hast founded them for ever.
verses.bsb: Long ago I learned from Your testimonies that You have established them forever.

verses.kjv: Consider mine affliction, and deliver me: for I do not forget thy law.
verses.bsb: Look upon my affliction and rescue me, for I have not forgotten Your law.

verses.kjv: Plead my cause, and deliver me: quicken me according to thy word.
verses.bsb: Defend my cause and redeem me; revive me according to Your word.

verses.kjv: Salvation is far from the wicked: for they seek not thy statutes.
verses.bsb: Salvation is far from the wicked because they do not seek Your statutes.

verses.kjv: Great are thy tender mercies, O Lord: quicken me according to thy judgments.
verses.bsb: Great are Your mercies, O LORD; revive me according to Your ordinances.

verses.kjv: Many are my persecutors and mine enemies; yet do I not decline from thy testimonies.
verses.bsb: Though my persecutors and foes are many, I have not turned from Your testimonies.

verses.kjv: I beheld the transgressors, and was grieved; because they kept not thy word.
verses.bsb: I look on the faithless with loathing because they do not keep Your word.

verses.kjv: Consider how I love thy precepts: quicken me, O Lord, according to thy lovingkindness.
verses.bsb: Consider how I love Your precepts, O LORD; give me life according to Your loving devotion.

verses.kjv: Thy word is true from the beginning: and every one of thy righteous judgments endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: The entirety of Your word is truth, and all Your righteous judgments endure forever.

verses.kjv: Princes have persecuted me without a cause: but my heart standeth in awe of thy word.
verses.bsb: Rulers persecute me without cause, but my heart fears only Your word.

verses.kjv: I rejoice at thy word, as one that findeth great spoil.
verses.bsb: I rejoice in Your promise like one who finds great spoil.

verses.kjv: I hate and abhor lying: but thy law do I love.
verses.bsb: I hate and abhor falsehood, but Your law I love.

verses.kjv: Seven times a day do I praise thee because of thy righteous judgments.
verses.bsb: Seven times a day I praise You for Your righteous judgments.

verses.kjv: Great peace have they which love thy law: and nothing shall offend them.
verses.bsb: Abundant peace belongs to those who love Your law; nothing can make them stumble.

verses.kjv: Lord, I have hoped for thy salvation, and done thy commandments.
verses.bsb: I wait for Your salvation, O LORD, and I carry out Your commandments.

verses.kjv: My soul hath kept thy testimonies; and I love them exceedingly.
verses.bsb: I obey Your testimonies and love them greatly.

verses.kjv: I have kept thy precepts and thy testimonies: for all my ways are before thee.
verses.bsb: I obey Your precepts and Your testimonies, for all my ways are before You.

verses.kjv: Let my cry come near before thee, O Lord: give me understanding according to thy word.
verses.bsb: May my cry come before You, O LORD; give me understanding according to Your word.

verses.kjv: Let my supplication come before thee: deliver me according to thy word.
verses.bsb: May my plea come before You; rescue me according to Your promise.

verses.kjv: My lips shall utter praise, when thou hast taught me thy statutes.
verses.bsb: My lips pour forth praise, for You teach me Your statutes.

verses.kjv: My tongue shall speak of thy word: for all thy commandments are righteousness.
verses.bsb: My tongue sings of Your word, for all Your commandments are righteous.

verses.kjv: Let thine hand help me; for I have chosen thy precepts.
verses.bsb: May Your hand be ready to help me, for I have chosen Your precepts.

verses.kjv: I have longed for thy salvation, O Lord; and thy law is my delight.
verses.bsb: I long for Your salvation, O LORD, and Your law is my delight.

verses.kjv: Let my soul live, and it shall praise thee; and let thy judgments help me.
verses.bsb: Let me live to praise You; may Your judgments sustain me.

verses.kjv: I have gone astray like a lost sheep; seek thy servant; for I do not forget thy commandments.
verses.bsb: I have strayed like a lost sheep; seek Your servant, for I have not forgotten Your commandments.

verses.kjv: IN my distress I cried unto the Lord, and he heard me.
verses.bsb: In my distress I cried to the LORD, and He answered me.

verses.kjv: Deliver my soul, O Lord, from lying lips, and from a deceitful tongue.
verses.bsb: Deliver my soul, O LORD, from lying lips and a deceitful tongue.

verses.kjv: What shall be given unto thee? or what shall be done unto thee, thou false tongue?
verses.bsb: What will He do to you, and what will be added to you, O deceitful tongue?

verses.kjv: Sharp arrows of the mighty, with coals of juniper.
verses.bsb: Sharp arrows will come from the warrior, with burning coals of the broom tree!

verses.kjv: Woe is me, that I sojourn in Mesech, that I dwell in the tents of Kedar!
verses.bsb: Woe to me that I dwell in Meshech, that I live among the tents of Kedar!

verses.kjv: My soul hath long dwelt with him that hateth peace.
verses.bsb: Too long have I dwelt among those who hate peace.

verses.kjv: I am for peace: but when I speak, they are for war.
verses.bsb: I am in favor of peace; but when I speak, they want war.

verses.kjv: I WILL lift up mine eyes unto the hills, from whence cometh my help.
verses.bsb: I lift up my eyes to the hills. From where does my help come?

verses.kjv: My help cometh from the Lord, which made heaven and earth.
verses.bsb: My help comes from the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth.

verses.kjv: He will not suffer thy foot to be moved: he that keepeth thee will not slumber.
verses.bsb: He will not allow your foot to slip; your Protector will not slumber.

verses.kjv: Behold, he that keepeth Israel shall neither slumber nor sleep.
verses.bsb: Behold, the Protector of Israel will neither slumber nor sleep.

verses.kjv: The Lord is thy keeper: the Lord is thy shade upon thy right hand.
verses.bsb: The LORD is your keeper; the LORD is the shade on your right hand.

verses.kjv: The sun shall not smite thee by day, nor the moon by night.
verses.bsb: The sun will not strike you by day, nor the moon by night.

verses.kjv: The Lord shall preserve thee from all evil: he shall preserve thy soul.
verses.bsb: The LORD will guard you from all evil; He will preserve your soul.

verses.kjv: The Lord shall preserve thy going out and thy coming in from this time forth, and even for evermore.
verses.bsb: The LORD will watch over your coming and going, both now and forevermore.

verses.kjv: I WAS glad when they said unto me, Let us go into the house of the Lord.
verses.bsb: I was glad when they said to me, “Let us go to the house of the LORD.”

verses.kjv: Our feet shall stand within thy gates, O Jerusalem.
verses.bsb: Our feet are standing in your gates, O Jerusalem.

verses.kjv: Jerusalem is builded as a city that is compact together:
verses.bsb: Jerusalem is built up as a city united together,

verses.kjv: Whither the tribes go up, the tribes of the Lord, unto the testimony of Israel, to give thanks unto the name of the Lord.
verses.bsb: where the tribes go up, the tribes of the LORD, as a testimony for Israel, to give thanks to the name of the LORD.

verses.kjv: For there are set thrones of judgment, the thrones of the house of David.
verses.bsb: For there the thrones of judgment stand, the thrones of the house of David.

verses.kjv: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: they shall prosper that love thee.
verses.bsb: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: “May those who love you prosper.

verses.kjv: Peace be within thy walls, and prosperity within thy palaces.
verses.bsb: May there be peace within your walls, and prosperity inside your fortresses.”

verses.kjv: For my brethren and companions’ sakes, I will now say, Peace be within thee.
verses.bsb: For the sake of my brothers and friends, I will say, “Peace be within you.”

verses.kjv: Because of the house of the Lord our God I will seek thy good.
verses.bsb: For the sake of the house of the LORD our God, I will seek your prosperity.

verses.kjv: UNTO thee lift I up mine eyes, O thou that dwellest in the heavens.
verses.bsb: I lift up my eyes to You, the One enthroned in heaven.

verses.kjv: Behold, as the eyes of servants look unto the hand of their masters, and as the eyes of a maiden unto the hand of her mistress; so our eyes wait upon the Lord our God, until that he have mercy upon us.
verses.bsb: As the eyes of servants look to the hand of their master, as the eyes of a maidservant look to the hand of her mistress, so our eyes are on the LORD our God until He shows us mercy.

verses.kjv: Have mercy upon us, O Lord, have mercy upon us: for we are exceedingly filled with contempt.
verses.bsb: Have mercy on us, O LORD, have mercy, for we have endured much contempt.

verses.kjv: Our soul is exceedingly filled with the scorning of those that are at ease, and with the contempt of the proud.
verses.bsb: We have endured much scorn from the arrogant, much contempt from the proud.

verses.kjv: IF it had not been the Lord who was on our side, now may Israel say;
verses.bsb: If the LORD had not been on our side— let Israel now declare—

verses.kjv: If it had not been the Lord who was on our side, when men rose up against us:
verses.bsb: if the LORD had not been on our side when men attacked us,

verses.kjv: Then they had swallowed us up quick, when their wrath was kindled against us:
verses.bsb: when their anger flared against us, then they would have swallowed us alive,

verses.kjv: Then the waters had overwhelmed us, the stream had gone over our soul:
verses.bsb: then the floods would have engulfed us, then the torrent would have overwhelmed us,

verses.kjv: Then the proud waters had gone over our soul.
verses.bsb: then the raging waters would have swept us away.

verses.kjv: Blessed be the Lord, who hath not given us as a prey to their teeth.
verses.bsb: Blessed be the LORD, who has not given us as prey to their teeth.

verses.kjv: Our soul is escaped as a bird out of the snare of the fowlers: the snare is broken, and we are escaped.
verses.bsb: We have escaped like a bird from the snare of the fowler; the net is torn, and we have slipped away.

verses.kjv: Our help is in the name of the Lord, who made heaven and earth.
verses.bsb: Our help is in the name of the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth.

verses.kjv: THEY that trust in the Lord shall be as mount Zion, which cannot be removed, but abideth for ever.
verses.bsb: Those who trust in the LORD are like Mount Zion. It cannot be moved; it abides forever.

verses.kjv: As the mountains are round about Jerusalem, so the Lord is round about his people from henceforth even for ever.
verses.bsb: As the mountains surround Jerusalem, so the LORD surrounds His people, both now and forevermore.

verses.kjv: For the rod of the wicked shall not rest upon the lot of the righteous; lest the righteous put forth their hands unto iniquity.
verses.bsb: For the scepter of the wicked will not rest upon the land allotted to the righteous, so that the righteous will not put forth their hands to injustice.

verses.kjv: Do good, O Lord, unto those that be good, and to them that are upright in their hearts.
verses.bsb: Do good, O LORD, to those who are good, and to the upright in heart.

verses.kjv: As for such as turn aside unto their crooked ways, the Lord shall lead them forth with the workers of iniquity: but peace shall be upon Israel.
verses.bsb: But those who turn to crooked ways the LORD will banish with the evildoers.   Peace be upon Israel.

verses.kjv: WHEN the Lord turned again the captivity of Zion, we were like them that dream.
verses.bsb: When the LORD restored the captives of Zion, we were like dreamers.

verses.kjv: Then was our mouth filled with laughter, and our tongue with singing: then said they among the heathen, The Lord hath done great things for them.
verses.bsb: Then our mouths were filled with laughter, our tongues with shouts of joy. Then it was said among the nations, “The LORD has done great things for them.”

verses.kjv: The Lord hath done great things for us; whereof we are glad.
verses.bsb: The LORD has done great things for us; we are filled with joy.

verses.kjv: Turn again our captivity, O Lord, as the streams in the south.
verses.bsb: Restore our captives, O LORD, like streams in the Negev.

verses.kjv: They that sow in tears shall reap in joy.
verses.bsb: Those who sow in tears will reap with shouts of joy.

verses.kjv: He that goeth forth and weepeth, bearing precious seed, shall doubtless come again with rejoicing, bringing his sheaves with him.
verses.bsb: He who goes out weeping, bearing a trail of seed, will surely return with shouts of joy, carrying sheaves of grain.

verses.kjv: EXCEPT the Lord build the house, they labour in vain that build it: except the Lord keep the city, the watchman waketh but in vain.
verses.bsb: Unless the LORD builds the house, its builders labor in vain; unless the LORD protects the city, its watchmen stand guard in vain.

verses.kjv: It is vain for you to rise up early, to sit up late, to eat the bread of sorrows: for so he giveth his beloved sleep.
verses.bsb: In vain you rise early and stay up late, toiling for bread to eat— for He gives sleep to His beloved.

verses.kjv: Lo, children are an heritage of the Lord: and the fruit of the womb is his reward.
verses.bsb: Children are indeed a heritage from the LORD, and the fruit of the womb is His reward.

verses.kjv: As arrows are in the hand of a mighty man; so are children of the youth.
verses.bsb: Like arrows in the hand of a warrior, so are children born in one’s youth.

verses.kjv: Happy is the man that hath his quiver full of them: they shall not be ashamed, but they shall speak with the enemies in the gate.
verses.bsb: Blessed is the man whose quiver is full of them. He will not be put to shame when he confronts the enemies at the gate.

verses.kjv: BLESSED is every one that feareth the Lord; that walketh in his ways.
verses.bsb: Blessed are all who fear the LORD, who walk in His ways!

verses.kjv: For thou shalt eat the labour of thine hands: happy shalt thou be, and it shall be well with thee.
verses.bsb: For when you eat the fruit of your labor, blessings and prosperity will be yours.

verses.kjv: Thy wife shall be as a fruitful vine by the sides of thine house: thy children like olive plants round about thy table.
verses.bsb: Your wife will be like a fruitful vine flourishing within your house, your sons like olive shoots sitting around your table.

verses.kjv: Behold, that thus shall the man be blessed that feareth the Lord.
verses.bsb: In this way indeed shall blessing come to the man who fears the LORD.

verses.kjv: The Lord shall bless thee out of Zion: and thou shalt see the good of Jerusalem all the days of thy life.
verses.bsb: May the LORD bless you from Zion, that you may see the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life,

verses.kjv: Yea, thou shalt see thy children’s children, and peace upon Israel.
verses.bsb: that you may see your children’s children.   Peace be upon Israel!

verses.kjv: MANY a time have they afflicted me from my youth, may Israel now say:
verses.bsb: Many a time they have persecuted me from my youth— let Israel now declare—

verses.kjv: Many a time have they afflicted me from my youth: yet they have not prevailed against me.
verses.bsb: many a time they have persecuted me from my youth, but they have not prevailed against me.

verses.kjv: The plowers plowed upon my back: they made long their furrows.
verses.bsb: The plowmen plowed over my back; they made their furrows long.

verses.kjv: The Lord is righteous: he hath cut asunder the cords of the wicked.
verses.bsb: The LORD is righteous; He has cut me from the cords of the wicked.

verses.kjv: Let them all be confounded and turned back that hate Zion.
verses.bsb: May all who hate Zion be turned back in shame.

verses.kjv: Let them be as the grass upon the housetops, which withereth afore it groweth up:
verses.bsb: May they be like grass on the rooftops, which withers before it can grow,

verses.kjv: Wherewith the mower filleth not his hand; nor he that bindeth sheaves his bosom.
verses.bsb: unable to fill the hands of the reaper, or the arms of the binder of sheaves.

verses.kjv: Neither do they which go by say, The blessing of the Lord be upon you: we bless you in the name of the Lord.
verses.bsb: May none who pass by say to them, “The blessing of the LORD be on you; we bless you in the name of the LORD.”

verses.kjv: OUT of the depths have I cried unto thee, O Lord.
verses.bsb: Out of the depths I cry to You, O LORD!

verses.kjv: Lord, hear my voice: let thine ears be attentive to the voice of my supplications.
verses.bsb: O Lord, hear my voice; let Your ears be attentive to my plea for mercy.

verses.kjv: If thou, Lord, shouldest mark iniquities, O Lord, who shall stand?
verses.bsb: If You, O LORD, kept track of iniquities, then who, O Lord, could stand?

verses.kjv: But there is forgiveness with thee, that thou mayest be feared.
verses.bsb: But with You there is forgiveness, so that You may be feared.

verses.kjv: I wait for the Lord, my soul doth wait, and in his word do I hope.
verses.bsb: I wait for the LORD; my soul does wait, and in His word I put my hope.

verses.kjv: My soul waiteth for the Lord more than they that watch for the morning: I say, more than they that watch for the morning.
verses.bsb: My soul waits for the Lord more than watchmen wait for the morning— more than watchmen wait for the morning.

verses.kjv: Let Israel hope in the Lord: for with the Lord there is mercy, and with him is plenteous redemption.
verses.bsb: O Israel, put your hope in the LORD, for with the LORD is loving devotion, and with Him is redemption in abundance.

verses.kjv: And he shall redeem Israel from all his iniquities.
verses.bsb: And He will redeem Israel from all iniquity.

verses.kjv: LORD, my heart is not haughty, nor mine eyes lofty: neither do I exercise myself in great matters, or in things too high for me.
verses.bsb: My heart is not proud, O LORD, my eyes are not haughty. I do not aspire to great things or matters too lofty for me.

verses.kjv: Surely I have behaved and quieted myself, as a child that is weaned of his mother: my soul is even as a weaned child.
verses.bsb: Surely I have stilled and quieted my soul; like a weaned child with his mother, like a weaned child is my soul within me.

verses.kjv: Let Israel hope in the Lord from henceforth and for ever.
verses.bsb: O Israel, put your hope in the LORD, both now and forevermore.

verses.kjv: LORD, remember David, and all his afflictions:
verses.bsb: O LORD, remember on behalf of David all the hardships he endured,

verses.kjv: How he sware unto the Lord, and vowed unto the mighty God of Jacob;
verses.bsb: how he swore an oath to the LORD, and vowed to the Mighty One of Jacob:

verses.kjv: Surely I will not come into the tabernacle of my house, nor go up into my bed;
verses.bsb: “I will not enter my house or get into my bed,

verses.kjv: I will not give sleep to mine eyes, or slumber to mine eyelids,
verses.bsb: I will not give sleep to my eyes or slumber to my eyelids,

verses.kjv: Until I find out a place for the Lord, an habitation for the mighty God of Jacob.
verses.bsb: until I find a place for the LORD, a dwelling for the Mighty One of Jacob.”

verses.kjv: Lo, we heard of it at Ephratah: we found it in the fields of the wood.
verses.bsb: We heard that the ark was in Ephrathah; we found it in the fields of Jaar.

verses.kjv: We will go into his tabernacles: we will worship at his footstool.
verses.bsb: Let us go to His dwelling place; let us worship at His footstool.

verses.kjv: Arise, O Lord, into thy rest; thou, and the ark of thy strength.
verses.bsb: Arise, O LORD, to Your resting place, You and the ark of Your strength.

verses.kjv: Let thy priests be clothed with righteousness; and let thy saints shout for joy.
verses.bsb: May Your priests be clothed with righteousness, and Your saints shout for joy.

verses.kjv: For thy servant David’s sake turn not away the face of thine anointed.
verses.bsb: For the sake of Your servant David, do not reject Your anointed one.

verses.kjv: The Lord hath sworn in truth unto David; he will not turn from it; Of the fruit of thy body will I set upon thy throne.
verses.bsb: The LORD swore an oath to David, a promise He will not revoke: “One of your descendants I will place on your throne.

verses.kjv: If thy children will keep my covenant and my testimony that I shall teach them, their children shall also sit upon thy throne for evermore.
verses.bsb: If your sons keep My covenant and the testimony I will teach them, then their sons will also sit on your throne forever and ever.”

verses.kjv: For the Lord hath chosen Zion; he hath desired it for his habitation.
verses.bsb: For the LORD has chosen Zion; He has desired it for His home:

verses.kjv: This is my rest for ever: here will I dwell; for I have desired it.
verses.bsb: “This is My resting place forever and ever; here I will dwell, for I have desired this home.

verses.kjv: I will abundantly bless her provision: I will satisfy her poor with bread.
verses.bsb: I will bless her with abundant provisions; I will satisfy her poor with bread.

verses.kjv: I will also clothe her priests with salvation: and her saints shall shout aloud for joy.
verses.bsb: I will clothe her priests with salvation, and her saints will sing out in joy.

verses.kjv: There will I make the horn of David to bud: I have ordained a lamp for mine anointed.
verses.bsb: There I will make a horn grow for David; I have prepared a lamp for My anointed one.

verses.kjv: His enemies will I clothe with shame: but upon himself shall his crown flourish.
verses.bsb: I will clothe his enemies with shame, but the crown upon him will gleam.”

verses.kjv: BEHOLD, how good and how pleasant it is for brethren to dwell together in unity!
verses.bsb: Behold, how good and pleasant it is when brothers live together in harmony!

verses.kjv: It is like the precious ointment upon the head, that ran down upon the beard, even Aaron’s beard: that went down to the skirts of his garments;
verses.bsb: It is like fine oil on the head, running down on the beard, running down Aaron’s beard over the collar of his robes.

verses.kjv: As the dew of Hermon, and as the dew that descended upon the mountains of Zion: for there the Lord commanded the blessing, even life for evermore.
verses.bsb: It is like the dew of Hermon falling on the mountains of Zion. For there the LORD has bestowed the blessing of life forevermore.

verses.kjv: BEHOLD, bless ye the Lord, all ye servants of the Lord, which by night stand in the house of the Lord.
verses.bsb: Come, bless the LORD, all you servants of the LORD who serve by night in the house of the LORD!

verses.kjv: Lift up your hands in the sanctuary, and bless the Lord.
verses.bsb: Lift up your hands to the sanctuary and bless the LORD!

verses.kjv: The Lord that made heaven and earth bless thee out of Zion.
verses.bsb: May the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth, bless you from Zion.

verses.kjv: PRAISE ye the Lord. Praise ye the name of the Lord; praise him, O ye servants of the Lord.
verses.bsb: Hallelujah!   Praise the name of the LORD. Give praise, O servants of the LORD,

verses.kjv: Ye that stand in the house of the Lord, in the courts of the house of our God,
verses.bsb: who stand in the house of the LORD, in the courts of the house of our God.

verses.kjv: Praise the Lord; for the Lord is good: sing praises unto his name; for it is pleasant.
verses.bsb: Hallelujah, for the LORD is good; sing praises to His name, for it is lovely.

verses.kjv: For the Lord hath chosen Jacob unto himself, and Israel for his peculiar treasure.
verses.bsb: For the LORD has chosen Jacob as His own, Israel as His treasured possession.

verses.kjv: For I know that the Lord is great, and that our Lord is above all gods.
verses.bsb: For I know that the LORD is great; our Lord is above all gods.

verses.kjv: Whatsoever the Lord pleased, that did he in heaven, and in earth, in the seas, and all deep places.
verses.bsb: The LORD does all that pleases Him in the heavens and on the earth, in the seas and in all their depths.

verses.kjv: He causeth the vapours to ascend from the ends of the earth; he maketh lightnings for the rain; he bringeth the wind out of his treasuries.
verses.bsb: He causes the clouds to rise from the ends of the earth. He generates the lightning with the rain and brings forth the wind from His storehouses.

verses.kjv: Who smote the firstborn of Egypt, both of man and beast.
verses.bsb: He struck down the firstborn of Egypt, of both man and beast.

verses.kjv: Who sent tokens and wonders into the midst of thee, O Egypt, upon Pharaoh, and upon all his servants.
verses.bsb: He sent signs and wonders into your midst, O Egypt, against Pharaoh and all his servants.

verses.kjv: Who smote great nations, and slew mighty kings;
verses.bsb: He struck down many nations and slaughtered mighty kings:

verses.kjv: Sihon king of the Amorites, and Og king of Bashan, and all the kingdoms of Canaan:
verses.bsb: Sihon king of the Amorites, Og king of Bashan, and all the kings of Canaan.

verses.kjv: And gave their land for an heritage, an heritage unto Israel his people.
verses.bsb: He gave their land as an inheritance, as a heritage to His people Israel.

verses.kjv: Thy name, O Lord, endureth for ever; and thy memorial, O Lord, throughout all generations.
verses.bsb: Your name, O LORD, endures forever, Your renown, O LORD, through all generations.

verses.kjv: For the Lord will judge his people, and he will repent himself concerning his servants.
verses.bsb: For the LORD will vindicate His people and will have compassion on His servants.

verses.kjv: The idols of the heathen are silver and gold, the work of men’s hands.
verses.bsb: The idols of the nations are silver and gold, made by the hands of men.

verses.kjv: They have mouths, but they speak not; eyes have they, but they see not;
verses.bsb: They have mouths, but cannot speak; they have eyes, but cannot see;

verses.kjv: They have ears, but they hear not; neither is there any breath in their mouths.
verses.bsb: they have ears, but cannot hear; nor is there breath in their mouths.

verses.kjv: They that make them are like unto them: so is every one that trusteth in them.
verses.bsb: Those who make them become like them, as do all who trust in them.

verses.kjv: Bless the Lord, O house of Israel: bless the Lord, O house of Aaron:
verses.bsb: O house of Israel, bless the LORD; O house of Aaron, bless the LORD;

verses.kjv: Bless the Lord, O house of Levi: ye that fear the Lord, bless the Lord.
verses.bsb: O house of Levi, bless the LORD; you who fear the LORD, bless the LORD!

verses.kjv: Blessed be the Lord out of Zion, which dwelleth at Jerusalem. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.bsb: Blessed be the LORD from Zion— He who dwells in Jerusalem.   Hallelujah!

verses.kjv: O GIVE thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: Give thanks to the LORD, for He is good. His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: O give thanks unto the God of gods: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: Give thanks to the God of gods. His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: O give thanks to the Lord of lords: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: Give thanks to the Lord of lords. His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: To him who alone doeth great wonders: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: He alone does great wonders. His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: To him that by wisdom made the heavens: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: By His insight He made the heavens. His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: To him that stretched out the earth above the waters: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: He spread out the earth upon the waters. His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: To him that made great lights: for his mercy endureth for ever:
verses.bsb: He made the great lights— His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: The sun to rule by day: for his mercy endureth for ever:
verses.bsb: the sun to rule the day, His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: The moon and stars to rule by night: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: the moon and stars to govern the night. His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: To him that smote Egypt in their firstborn: for his mercy endureth for ever:
verses.bsb: He struck down the firstborn of Egypt His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: And brought out Israel from among them: for his mercy endureth for ever:
verses.bsb: and brought Israel out from among them His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: With a strong hand, and with a stretched out arm: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: with a mighty hand and an outstretched arm. His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: To him which divided the Red sea into parts: for his mercy endureth for ever:
verses.bsb: He divided the Red Sea in two His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: And made Israel to pass through the midst of it: for his mercy endureth for ever:
verses.bsb: and led Israel through the midst, His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: But overthrew Pharaoh and his host in the Red sea: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: but swept Pharaoh and his army into the Red Sea. His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: To him which led his people through the wilderness: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: He led His people through the wilderness. His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: To him which smote great kings: for his mercy endureth for ever:
verses.bsb: He struck down great kings His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: And slew famous kings: for his mercy endureth for ever:
verses.bsb: and slaughtered mighty kings— His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: Sihon king of the Amorites: for his mercy endureth for ever:
verses.bsb: Sihon king of the Amorites His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: And Og the king of Bashan: for his mercy endureth for ever:
verses.bsb: and Og king of Bashan— His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: And gave their land for an heritage: for his mercy endureth for ever:
verses.bsb: and He gave their land as an inheritance, His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: Even an heritage unto Israel his servant: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: a heritage to His servant Israel. His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: Who remembered us in our low estate: for his mercy endureth for ever:
verses.bsb: He remembered us in our low estate His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: And hath redeemed us from our enemies: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: and freed us from our enemies. His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: Who giveth food to all flesh: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: He gives food to every creature. His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: O give thanks unto the God of heaven: for his mercy endureth for ever.
verses.bsb: Give thanks to the God of heaven! His loving devotion endures forever.

verses.kjv: BY the rivers of Babylon, there we sat down, yea, we wept, when we remembered Zion.
verses.bsb: By the rivers of Babylon we sat and wept when we remembered Zion.

verses.kjv: We hanged our harps upon the willows in the midst thereof.
verses.bsb: There on the willows we hung our harps,

verses.kjv: For there they that carried us away captive required of us a song; and they that wasted us required of us mirth, saying, Sing us one of the songs of Zion.
verses.bsb: for there our captors requested a song; our tormentors demanded songs of joy:   “Sing us a song of Zion.”

verses.kjv: How shall we sing the Lord’s song in a strange land?
verses.bsb: How can we sing a song of the LORD in a foreign land?

verses.kjv: If I forget thee, O Jerusalem, let my right hand forget her cunning.
verses.bsb: If I forget you, O Jerusalem, may my right hand cease to function.

verses.kjv: If I do not remember thee, let my tongue cleave to the roof of my mouth; if I prefer not Jerusalem above my chief joy.
verses.bsb: May my tongue cling to the roof of my mouth if I do not remember you, if I do not exalt Jerusalem as my greatest joy!

verses.kjv: Remember, O Lord, the children of Edom in the day of Jerusalem; who said, Rase it, rase it, even to the foundation thereof.
verses.bsb: Remember, O LORD, the sons of Edom on the day Jerusalem fell: “Destroy it,” they said, “tear it down to its foundations!”

verses.kjv: O daughter of Babylon, who art to be destroyed; happy shall he be, that rewardeth thee as thou hast served us.
verses.bsb: O Daughter of Babylon, doomed to destruction, blessed is he who repays you as you have done to us.

verses.kjv: Happy shall he be, that taketh and dasheth thy little ones against the stones.
verses.bsb: Blessed is he who seizes your infants and dashes them against the rocks.

verses.kjv: I WILL praise thee with my whole heart: before the gods will I sing praise unto thee.
verses.bsb: I give You thanks with all my heart; before the gods I sing Your praises.

verses.kjv: I will worship toward thy holy temple, and praise thy name for thy lovingkindness and for thy truth: for thou hast magnified thy word above all thy name.
verses.bsb: I bow down toward Your holy temple and give thanks to Your name for Your loving devotion and Your faithfulness; You have exalted Your name and Your word above all else.

verses.kjv: In the day when I cried thou answeredst me, and strengthenedst me with strength in my soul.
verses.bsb: On the day I called, You answered me; You emboldened me and strengthened my soul.

verses.kjv: All the kings of the earth shall praise thee, O Lord, when they hear the words of thy mouth.
verses.bsb: All the kings of the earth will give You thanks, O LORD, when they hear the words of Your mouth.

verses.kjv: Yea, they shall sing in the ways of the Lord: for great is the glory of the Lord.
verses.bsb: They will sing of the ways of the LORD, for the glory of the LORD is great.

verses.kjv: Though the Lord be high, yet hath he respect unto the lowly: but the proud he knoweth afar off.
verses.bsb: Though the LORD is on high, He attends to the lowly; but the proud He knows from afar.

verses.kjv: Though I walk in the midst of trouble, thou wilt revive me: thou shalt stretch forth thine hand against the wrath of mine enemies, and thy right hand shall save me.
verses.bsb: If I walk in the midst of trouble, You preserve me from the anger of my foes; You extend Your hand, and Your right hand saves me.

verses.kjv: The Lord will perfect that which concerneth me: thy mercy, O Lord, endureth for ever: forsake not the works of thine own hands.
verses.bsb: The LORD will fulfill His purpose for me.   O LORD, Your loving devotion endures forever— do not abandon the works of Your hands.

verses.kjv: O LORD, thou hast searched me, and known me.
verses.bsb: O LORD, You have searched me and known me.

verses.kjv: Thou knowest my downsitting and mine uprising, thou understandest my thought afar off.
verses.bsb: You know when I sit and when I rise; You understand my thoughts from afar.

verses.kjv: Thou compassest my path and my lying down, and art acquainted with all my ways.
verses.bsb: You search out my path and my lying down; You are aware of all my ways.

verses.kjv: For there is not a word in my tongue, but, lo, O Lord, thou knowest it altogether.
verses.bsb: Even before a word is on my tongue, You know all about it, O LORD.

verses.kjv: Thou hast beset me behind and before, and laid thine hand upon me.
verses.bsb: You hem me in behind and before; You have laid Your hand upon me.

verses.kjv: Such knowledge is too wonderful for me; it is high, I cannot attain unto it.
verses.bsb: Such knowledge is too wonderful for me, too lofty for me to attain.

verses.kjv: Whither shall I go from thy spirit? or whither shall I flee from thy presence?
verses.bsb: Where can I go to escape Your Spirit? Where can I flee from Your presence?

verses.kjv: If I ascend up into heaven, thou art there: if I make my bed in hell, behold, thou art there.
verses.bsb: If I ascend to the heavens, You are there; if I make my bed in Sheol, You are there.

verses.kjv: If I take the wings of the morning, and dwell in the uttermost parts of the sea;
verses.bsb: If I rise on the wings of the dawn, if I settle by the farthest sea,

verses.kjv: Even there shall thy hand lead me, and thy right hand shall hold me.
verses.bsb: even there Your hand will guide me; Your right hand will hold me fast.

verses.kjv: If I say, Surely the darkness shall cover me; even the night shall be light about me.
verses.bsb: If I say, “Surely the darkness will hide me, and the light become night around me”—

verses.kjv: Yea, the darkness hideth not from thee; but the night shineth as the day: the darkness and the light are both alike to thee.
verses.bsb: even the darkness is not dark to You, but the night shines like the day, for darkness is as light to You.

verses.kjv: For thou hast possessed my reins: thou hast covered me in my mother’s womb.
verses.bsb: For You formed my inmost being; You knit me together in my mother’s womb.

verses.kjv: I will praise thee; for I am fearfully and wonderfully made: marvellous are thy works; and that my soul knoweth right well.
verses.bsb: I praise You, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made. Marvelous are Your works, and I know this very well.

verses.kjv: My substance was not hid from thee, when I was made in secret, and curiously wrought in the lowest parts of the earth.
verses.bsb: My frame was not hidden from You when I was made in secret, when I was woven together in the depths of the earth.

verses.kjv: Thine eyes did see my substance, yet being unperfect; and in thy book all my members were written, which in continuance were fashioned, when as yet there was none of them.
verses.bsb: Your eyes saw my unformed body; all my days were written in Your book and ordained for me before one of them came to be.

verses.kjv: How precious also are thy thoughts unto me, O God! how great is the sum of them!
verses.bsb: How precious to me are Your thoughts, O God, how vast is their sum!

verses.kjv: If I should count them, they are more in number than the sand: when I awake, I am still with thee.
verses.bsb: If I were to count them, they would outnumber the grains of sand; and when I awake, I am still with You.

verses.kjv: Surely thou wilt slay the wicked, O God: depart from me therefore, ye bloody men.
verses.bsb: O God, that You would slay the wicked— away from me, you bloodthirsty men—

verses.kjv: For they speak against thee wickedly, and thine enemies take thy name in vain.
verses.bsb: who speak of You deceitfully; Your enemies take Your name in vain.

verses.kjv: Do not I hate them, O Lord, that hate thee? and am not I grieved with those that rise up against thee?
verses.bsb: Do I not hate those who hate You, O LORD, and detest those who rise against You?

verses.kjv: I hate them with perfect hatred: I count them mine enemies.
verses.bsb: I hate them with perfect hatred; I count them as my enemies.

verses.kjv: Search me, O God, and know my heart: try me, and know my thoughts:
verses.bsb: Search me, O God, and know my heart; test me and know my concerns.

verses.kjv: And see if there be any wicked way in me, and lead me in the way everlasting.
verses.bsb: See if there is any offensive way in me; lead me in the way everlasting.

verses.kjv: DELIVER me, O Lord, from the evil man: preserve me from the violent man;
verses.bsb: Rescue me, O LORD, from evil men. Protect me from men of violence,

verses.kjv: Which imagine mischiefs in their heart; continually are they gathered together for war.
verses.bsb: who devise evil in their hearts and stir up war all day long.

verses.kjv: They have sharpened their tongues like a serpent; adders’ poison is under their lips. Selah.
verses.bsb: They sharpen their tongues like snakes; the venom of vipers is on their lips. Selah

verses.kjv: Keep me, O Lord, from the hands of the wicked; preserve me from the violent man; who have purposed to overthrow my goings.
verses.bsb: Guard me, O LORD, from the hands of the wicked. Keep me safe from men of violence who scheme to make me stumble.

verses.kjv: The proud have hid a snare for me, and cords; they have spread a net by the wayside; they have set gins for me. Selah.
verses.bsb: The proud hide a snare for me; the cords of their net are spread along the path, and lures are set out for me. Selah

verses.kjv: I said unto the Lord, Thou art my God: hear the voice of my supplications, O Lord.
verses.bsb: I say to the LORD, “You are my God.” Hear, O LORD, my cry for help.

verses.kjv: O God the Lord, the strength of my salvation, thou hast covered my head in the day of battle.
verses.bsb: O GOD the Lord, the strength of my salvation, You shield my head in the day of battle.

verses.kjv: Grant not, O Lord, the desires of the wicked: further not his wicked device; lest they exalt themselves. Selah.
verses.bsb: Grant not, O LORD, the desires of the wicked; do not promote their evil plans, lest they be exalted. Selah

verses.kjv: As for the head of those that compass me about, let the mischief of their own lips cover them.
verses.bsb: May the heads of those who surround me be covered in the trouble their lips have caused.

verses.kjv: Let burning coals fall upon them: let them be cast into the fire; into deep pits, that they rise not up again.
verses.bsb: May burning coals fall on them; may they be thrown into the fire, into the miry pits, never to rise again.

verses.kjv: Let not an evil speaker be established in the earth: evil shall hunt the violent man to overthrow him.
verses.bsb: May no slanderer be established in the land; may calamity hunt down the man of violence.

verses.kjv: I know that the Lord will maintain the cause of the afflicted, and the right of the poor.
verses.bsb: I know that the LORD upholds justice for the poor and defends the cause of the needy.

verses.kjv: Surely the righteous shall give thanks unto thy name: the upright shall dwell in thy presence.
verses.bsb: Surely the righteous will praise Your name; the upright will dwell in Your presence.

verses.kjv: LORD, I cry unto thee: make haste unto me; give ear unto my voice, when I cry unto thee.
verses.bsb: I call upon You, O LORD; come quickly to me. Hear my voice when I call to You.

verses.kjv: Let my prayer be set forth before thee as incense; and the lifting up of my hands as the evening sacrifice.
verses.bsb: May my prayer be set before You like incense, my uplifted hands like the evening offering.

verses.kjv: Set a watch, O Lord, before my mouth; keep the door of my lips.
verses.bsb: Set a guard, O LORD, over my mouth; keep watch at the door of my lips.

verses.kjv: Incline not my heart to any evil thing, to practise wicked works with men that work iniquity: and let me not eat of their dainties.
verses.bsb: Do not let my heart be drawn to any evil thing or take part in works of wickedness with men who do iniquity; let me not feast on their delicacies.

verses.kjv: Let the righteous smite me; it shall be a kindness: and let him reprove me; it shall be an excellent oil, which shall not break my head: for yet my prayer also shall be in their calamities.
verses.bsb: Let the righteous man strike me; let his rebuke be an act of loving devotion. It is oil for my head; let me not refuse it. For my prayer is ever against the deeds of the wicked.

verses.kjv: When their judges are overthrown in stony places, they shall hear my words; for they are sweet.
verses.bsb: When their rulers are thrown down from the cliffs, the people will listen to my words, for they are pleasant.

verses.kjv: Our bones are scattered at the grave’s mouth, as when one cutteth and cleaveth wood upon the earth.
verses.bsb: As when one plows and breaks up the soil, so our bones have been scattered at the mouth of Sheol.

verses.kjv: But mine eyes are unto thee, O God the Lord: in thee is my trust; leave not my soul destitute.
verses.bsb: But my eyes are fixed on You, O GOD the Lord. In You I seek refuge; do not leave my soul defenseless.

verses.kjv: Keep me from the snares which they have laid for me, and the gins of the workers of iniquity.
verses.bsb: Keep me from the snares they have laid for me, and from the lures of evildoers.

verses.kjv: Let the wicked fall into their own nets, whilst that I withal escape.
verses.bsb: Let the wicked fall into their own nets, while I pass by in safety.

verses.kjv: I CRIED unto the Lord with my voice; with my voice unto the Lord did I make my supplication.
verses.bsb: I cry aloud to the LORD; I lift my voice to the LORD for mercy.

verses.kjv: I poured out my complaint before him; I shewed before him my trouble.
verses.bsb: I pour out my complaint before Him; I reveal my trouble to Him.

verses.kjv: When my spirit was overwhelmed within me, then thou knewest my path. In the way wherein I walked have they privily laid a snare for me.
verses.bsb: Although my spirit grows faint within me, You know my way. Along the path I travel they have hidden a snare for me.

verses.kjv: I looked on my right hand, and beheld, but there was no man that would know me: refuge failed me; no man cared for my soul.
verses.bsb: Look to my right and see; no one attends to me. There is no refuge for me; no one cares for my soul.

verses.kjv: I cried unto thee, O Lord: I said, Thou art my refuge and my portion in the land of the living.
verses.bsb: I cry to You, O LORD: “You are my refuge, my portion in the land of the living.”

verses.kjv: Attend unto my cry; for I am brought very low: deliver me from my persecutors; for they are stronger than I.
verses.bsb: Listen to my cry, for I am brought quite low. Rescue me from my pursuers, for they are too strong for me.

verses.kjv: Bring my soul out of prison, that I may praise thy name: the righteous shall compass me about; for thou shalt deal bountifully with me.
verses.bsb: Free my soul from prison, that I may praise Your name. The righteous will gather around me because of Your goodness to me.

verses.kjv: HEAR my prayer, O Lord, give ear to my supplications: in thy faithfulness answer me, and in thy righteousness.
verses.bsb: O LORD, hear my prayer. In Your faithfulness, give ear to my plea; in Your righteousness, answer me.

verses.kjv: And enter not into judgment with thy servant: for in thy sight shall no man living be justified.
verses.bsb: Do not bring Your servant into judgment, for no one alive is righteous before You.

verses.kjv: For the enemy hath persecuted my soul; he hath smitten my life down to the ground; he hath made me to dwell in darkness, as those that have been long dead.
verses.bsb: For the enemy has pursued my soul, crushing my life to the ground, making me dwell in darkness like those long since dead.

verses.kjv: Therefore is my spirit overwhelmed within me; my heart within me is desolate.
verses.bsb: My spirit grows faint within me; my heart is dismayed inside me.

verses.kjv: I remember the days of old; I meditate on all thy works; I muse on the work of thy hands.
verses.bsb: I remember the days of old; I meditate on all Your works; I consider the work of Your hands.

verses.kjv: I stretch forth my hands unto thee: my soul thirsteth after thee, as a thirsty land. Selah.
verses.bsb: I stretch out my hands to You; my soul thirsts for You like a parched land. Selah

verses.kjv: Hear me speedily, O Lord: my spirit faileth: hide not thy face from me, lest I be like unto them that go down into the pit.
verses.bsb: Answer me quickly, O LORD; my spirit fails. Do not hide Your face from me, or I will be like those who descend to the Pit.

verses.kjv: Cause me to hear thy lovingkindness in the morning; for in thee do I trust: cause me to know the way wherein I should walk; for I lift up my soul unto thee.
verses.bsb: Let me hear Your loving devotion in the morning, for I have put my trust in You. Teach me the way I should walk, for to You I lift up my soul.

verses.kjv: Deliver me, O Lord, from mine enemies: I flee unto thee to hide me.
verses.bsb: Deliver me from my enemies, O LORD; I flee to You for refuge.

verses.kjv: Teach me to do thy will; for thou art my God: thy spirit is good; lead me into the land of uprightness.
verses.bsb: Teach me to do Your will, for You are my God. May Your good Spirit lead me on level ground.

verses.kjv: Quicken me, O Lord, for thy name’s sake: for thy righteousness’ sake bring my soul out of trouble.
verses.bsb: For the sake of Your name, O LORD, revive me. In Your righteousness, bring my soul out of trouble.

verses.kjv: And of thy mercy cut off mine enemies, and destroy all them that afflict my soul: for I am thy servant.
verses.bsb: And in Your loving devotion, cut off my enemies. Destroy all who afflict me, for I am Your servant.

verses.kjv: BLESSED be the Lord my strength, which teacheth my hands to war, and my fingers to fight:
verses.bsb: Blessed be the LORD, my Rock, who trains my hands for war, my fingers for battle.

verses.kjv: My goodness, and my fortress; my high tower, and my deliverer; my shield, and he in whom I trust; who subdueth my people under me.
verses.bsb: He is my steadfast love and my fortress, my stronghold and my deliverer. He is my shield, in whom I take refuge, who subdues peoples under me.

verses.kjv: Lord, what is man, that thou takest knowledge of him! or the son of man, that thou makest account of him!
verses.bsb: O LORD, what is man, that You regard him, the son of man that You think of him?

verses.kjv: Man is like to vanity: his days are as a shadow that passeth away.
verses.bsb: Man is like a breath; his days are like a passing shadow.

verses.kjv: Bow thy heavens, O Lord, and come down: touch the mountains, and they shall smoke.
verses.bsb: Part Your heavens, O LORD, and come down; touch the mountains, that they may smoke.

verses.kjv: Cast forth lightning, and scatter them: shoot out thine arrows, and destroy them.
verses.bsb: Flash forth Your lightning and scatter them; shoot Your arrows and rout them.

verses.kjv: Send thine hand from above; rid me, and deliver me out of great waters, from the hand of strange children;
verses.bsb: Reach down from on high; set me free and rescue me from the deep waters, from the grasp of foreigners,

verses.kjv: Whose mouth speaketh vanity, and their right hand is a right hand of falsehood.
verses.bsb: whose mouths speak falsehood, whose right hands are deceitful.

verses.kjv: I will sing a new song unto thee, O God: upon a psaltery and an instrument of ten strings will I sing praises unto thee.
verses.bsb: I will sing to You a new song, O God; on a harp of ten strings I will make music to You—

verses.kjv: It is he that giveth salvation unto kings: who delivereth David his servant from the hurtful sword.
verses.bsb: to Him who gives victory to kings, who frees His servant David from the deadly sword.

verses.kjv: Rid me, and deliver me from the hand of strange children, whose mouth speaketh vanity, and their right hand is a right hand of falsehood:
verses.bsb: Set me free and rescue me from the grasp of foreigners, whose mouths speak falsehood, whose right hands are deceitful.

verses.kjv: That our sons may be as plants grown up in their youth; that our daughters may be as corner stones, polished after the similitude of a palace:
verses.bsb: Then our sons will be like plants nurtured in their youth, our daughters like corner pillars carved to adorn a palace.

verses.kjv: That our garners may be full, affording all manner of store: that our sheep may bring forth thousands and ten thousands in our streets:
verses.bsb: Our storehouses will be full, supplying all manner of produce; our flocks will bring forth thousands, tens of thousands in our fields.

verses.kjv: That our oxen may be strong to labour; that there be no breaking in, nor going out; that there be no complaining in our streets.
verses.bsb: Our oxen will bear great loads. There will be no breach in the walls, no going into captivity, and no cry of lament in our streets.

verses.kjv: Happy is that people, that is in such a case: yea, happy is that people, whose God is the Lord.
verses.bsb: Blessed are the people of whom this is so; blessed are the people whose God is the LORD.

verses.kjv: I WILL extol thee, my God, O king; and I will bless thy name for ever and ever.
verses.bsb: I will exalt You, my God and King; I will bless Your name forever and ever.

verses.kjv: Every day will I bless thee; and I will praise thy name for ever and ever.
verses.bsb: Every day I will bless You, and I will praise Your name forever and ever.

verses.kjv: Great is the Lord, and greatly to be praised; and his greatness is unsearchable.
verses.bsb: Great is the LORD and greatly to be praised; His greatness is unsearchable.

verses.kjv: One generation shall praise thy works to another, and shall declare thy mighty acts.
verses.bsb: One generation will commend Your works to the next, and will proclaim Your mighty acts—

verses.kjv: I will speak of the glorious honour of thy majesty, and of thy wondrous works.
verses.bsb: the glorious splendor of Your majesty. And I will meditate on Your wondrous works.

verses.kjv: And men shall speak of the might of thy terrible acts: and I will declare thy greatness.
verses.bsb: They will proclaim the power of Your awesome deeds, and I will declare Your greatness.

verses.kjv: They shall abundantly utter the memory of thy great goodness, and shall sing of thy righteousness.
verses.bsb: They will extol the fame of Your abundant goodness and sing joyfully of Your righteousness.

verses.kjv: The Lord is gracious, and full of compassion; slow to anger, and of great mercy.
verses.bsb: The LORD is gracious and compassionate, slow to anger and abounding in loving devotion.

verses.kjv: The Lord is good to all: and his tender mercies are over all his works.
verses.bsb: The LORD is good to all; His compassion rests on all He has made.

verses.kjv: All thy works shall praise thee, O Lord; and thy saints shall bless thee.
verses.bsb: All You have made will give You thanks, O LORD, and Your saints will bless You.

verses.kjv: They shall speak of the glory of thy kingdom, and talk of thy power;
verses.bsb: They will tell of the glory of Your kingdom and speak of Your might,

verses.kjv: To make known to the sons of men his mighty acts, and the glorious majesty of his kingdom.
verses.bsb: to make known to men Your mighty acts and the glorious splendor of Your kingdom.

verses.kjv: Thy kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, and thy dominion endureth throughout all generations.
verses.bsb: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, and Your dominion endures through all generations. The LORD is faithful in all His words and kind in all His actions.

verses.kjv: The Lord upholdeth all that fall, and raiseth up all those that be bowed down.
verses.bsb: The LORD upholds all who fall and lifts up all who are bowed down.

verses.kjv: The eyes of all wait upon thee; and thou givest them their meat in due season.
verses.bsb: The eyes of all look to You, and You give them their food in season.

verses.kjv: Thou openest thine hand, and satisfiest the desire of every living thing.
