verses.bsb: You open Your hand and satisfy the desire of every living thing.

verses.kjv: The Lord is righteous in all his ways, and holy in all his works.
verses.bsb: The LORD is righteous in all His ways and kind in all His deeds.

verses.kjv: The Lord is nigh unto all them that call upon him, to all that call upon him in truth.
verses.bsb: The LORD is near to all who call on Him, to all who call out to Him in truth.

verses.kjv: He will fulfil the desire of them that fear him: he also will hear their cry, and will save them.
verses.bsb: He fulfills the desires of those who fear Him; He hears their cry and saves them.

verses.kjv: The Lord preserveth all them that love him: but all the wicked will he destroy.
verses.bsb: The LORD preserves all who love Him, but all the wicked He will destroy.

verses.kjv: My mouth shall speak the praise of the Lord: and let all flesh bless his holy name for ever and ever.
verses.bsb: My mouth will declare the praise of the LORD; let every creature bless His holy name forever and ever.

verses.kjv: PRAISE ye the Lord. Praise the Lord, O my soul.
verses.bsb: Hallelujah!   Praise the LORD, O my soul.

verses.kjv: While I live will I praise the Lord: I will sing praises unto my God while I have any being.
verses.bsb: I will praise the LORD all my life; I will sing praises to my God while I have my being.

verses.kjv: Put not your trust in princes, nor in the son of man, in whom there is no help.
verses.bsb: Put not your trust in princes, in mortal man, who cannot save.

verses.kjv: His breath goeth forth, he returneth to his earth; in that very day his thoughts perish.
verses.bsb: When his spirit departs, he returns to the ground; on that very day his plans perish.

verses.kjv: Happy is he that hath the God of Jacob for his help, whose hope is in the Lord his God:
verses.bsb: Blessed is he whose help is the God of Jacob, whose hope is in the LORD his God,

verses.kjv: Which made heaven, and earth, the sea, and all that therein is: which keepeth truth for ever:
verses.bsb: the Maker of heaven and earth, the sea, and everything in them. He remains faithful forever.

verses.kjv: Which executeth judgment for the oppressed: which giveth food to the hungry. The Lord looseth the prisoners:
verses.bsb: He executes justice for the oppressed and gives food to the hungry. The LORD sets the prisoners free,

verses.kjv: The Lord openeth the eyes of the blind: the Lord raiseth them that are bowed down: the Lord loveth the righteous:
verses.bsb: the LORD opens the eyes of the blind, the LORD lifts those who are weighed down, the LORD loves the righteous.

verses.kjv: The Lord preserveth the strangers; he relieveth the fatherless and widow: but the way of the wicked he turneth upside down.
verses.bsb: The LORD protects foreigners; He sustains the fatherless and the widow, but the ways of the wicked He frustrates.

verses.kjv: The Lord shall reign for ever, even thy God, O Zion, unto all generations. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.bsb: The LORD reigns forever, your God, O Zion, for all generations.   Hallelujah!

verses.kjv: PRAISE ye the Lord: for it is good to sing praises unto our God; for it is pleasant; and praise is comely.
verses.bsb: Hallelujah!   How good it is to sing praises to our God, how pleasant and lovely to praise Him!

verses.kjv: The Lord doth build up Jerusalem: he gathereth together the outcasts of Israel.
verses.bsb: The LORD builds up Jerusalem; He gathers the exiles of Israel.

verses.kjv: He healeth the broken in heart, and bindeth up their wounds.
verses.bsb: He heals the brokenhearted and binds up their wounds.

verses.kjv: He telleth the number of the stars; he calleth them all by their names.
verses.bsb: He determines the number of the stars; He calls them each by name.

verses.kjv: Great is our Lord, and of great power: his understanding is infinite.
verses.bsb: Great is our Lord, and mighty in power; His understanding has no limit.

verses.kjv: The Lord lifteth up the meek: he casteth the wicked down to the ground.
verses.bsb: The LORD sustains the humble, but casts the wicked to the ground.

verses.kjv: Sing unto the Lord with thanksgiving; sing praise upon the harp unto our God:
verses.bsb: Sing to the LORD with thanksgiving; make music on the harp to our God,

verses.kjv: Who covereth the heaven with clouds, who prepareth rain for the earth, who maketh grass to grow upon the mountains.
verses.bsb: who covers the sky with clouds, who prepares rain for the earth, who makes grass to grow on the hills.

verses.kjv: He giveth to the beast his food, and to the young ravens which cry.
verses.bsb: He provides food for the animals, and for the young ravens when they call.

verses.kjv: He delighteth not in the strength of the horse: he taketh not pleasure in the legs of a man.
verses.bsb: He does not delight in the strength of the horse; He takes no pleasure in the legpower of the man.

verses.kjv: The Lord taketh pleasure in them that fear him, in those that hope in his mercy.
verses.bsb: The LORD is pleased with those who fear Him, who hope in His loving devotion.

verses.kjv: Praise the Lord, O Jerusalem; praise thy God, O Zion.
verses.bsb: Exalt the LORD, O Jerusalem; praise your God, O Zion!

verses.kjv: For he hath strengthened the bars of thy gates; he hath blessed thy children within thee.
verses.bsb: For He strengthens the bars of your gates and blesses the children within you.

verses.kjv: He maketh peace in thy borders, and filleth thee with the finest of the wheat.
verses.bsb: He makes peace at your borders; He fills you with the finest wheat.

verses.kjv: He sendeth forth his commandment upon earth: his word runneth very swiftly.
verses.bsb: He sends forth His command to the earth; His word runs swiftly.

verses.kjv: He giveth snow like wool: he scattereth the hoarfrost like ashes.
verses.bsb: He spreads the snow like wool; He scatters the frost like ashes;

verses.kjv: He casteth forth his ice like morsels: who can stand before his cold?
verses.bsb: He casts forth His hail like pebbles. Who can withstand His icy blast?

verses.kjv: He sendeth out his word, and melteth them: he causeth his wind to blow, and the waters flow.
verses.bsb: He sends forth His word and melts them; He unleashes His winds, and the waters flow.

verses.kjv: He sheweth his word unto Jacob, his statutes and his judgments unto Israel.
verses.bsb: He declares His word to Jacob, His statutes and judgments to Israel.

verses.kjv: He hath not dealt so with any nation: and as for his judgments, they have not known them. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.bsb: He has done this for no other nation; they do not know His judgments.   Hallelujah!

verses.kjv: PRAISE ye the Lord. Praise ye the Lord from the heavens: praise him in the heights.
verses.bsb: Hallelujah!   Praise the LORD from the heavens; praise Him in the highest places.

verses.kjv: Praise ye him, all his angels: praise ye him, all his hosts.
verses.bsb: Praise Him, all His angels; praise Him, all His heavenly hosts.

verses.kjv: Praise ye him, sun and moon: praise him, all ye stars of light.
verses.bsb: Praise Him, O sun and moon; praise Him, all you shining stars.

verses.kjv: Praise him, ye heavens of heavens, and ye waters that be above the heavens.
verses.bsb: Praise Him, O highest heavens, and you waters above the skies.

verses.kjv: Let them praise the name of the Lord: for he commanded, and they were created.
verses.bsb: Let them praise the name of the LORD, for He gave the command and they were created.

verses.kjv: He hath also stablished them for ever and ever: he hath made a decree which shall not pass.
verses.bsb: He established them forever and ever; He issued a decree that will never pass away.

verses.kjv: Praise the Lord from the earth, ye dragons, and all deeps:
verses.bsb: Praise the LORD from the earth, all great sea creatures and ocean depths,

verses.kjv: Fire, and hail; snow, and vapour; stormy wind fulfilling his word:
verses.bsb: lightning and hail, snow and clouds, powerful wind fulfilling His word,

verses.kjv: Mountains, and all hills; fruitful trees, and all cedars:
verses.bsb: mountains and all hills, fruit trees and all cedars,

verses.kjv: Beasts, and all cattle; creeping things, and flying fowl:
verses.bsb: wild animals and all cattle, crawling creatures and flying birds,

verses.kjv: Kings of the earth, and all people; princes, and all judges of the earth:
verses.bsb: kings of the earth and all peoples, princes and all rulers of the earth,

verses.kjv: Both young men, and maidens; old men, and children:
verses.bsb: young men and maidens, old and young together.

verses.kjv: Let them praise the name of the Lord: for his name alone is excellent; his glory is above the earth and heaven.
verses.bsb: Let them praise the name of the LORD, for His name alone is exalted; His splendor is above the earth and the heavens.

verses.kjv: He also exalteth the horn of his people, the praise of all his saints; even of the children of Israel, a people near unto him. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.bsb: He has raised up a horn for His people, the praise of all His saints, of Israel, a people near to Him.   Hallelujah!

verses.kjv: PRAISE ye the Lord. Sing unto the Lord a new song, and his praise in the congregation of saints.
verses.bsb: Hallelujah!   Sing to the LORD a new song— His praise in the assembly of the godly.

verses.kjv: Let Israel rejoice in him that made him: let the children of Zion be joyful in their King.
verses.bsb: Let Israel rejoice in their Maker; let the children of Zion rejoice in their King.

verses.kjv: Let them praise his name in the dance: let them sing praises unto him with the timbrel and harp.
verses.bsb: Let them praise His name with dancing, and make music to Him with tambourine and harp.

verses.kjv: For the Lord taketh pleasure in his people: he will beautify the meek with salvation.
verses.bsb: For the LORD takes pleasure in His people; He adorns the afflicted with salvation.

verses.kjv: Let the saints be joyful in glory: let them sing aloud upon their beds.
verses.bsb: Let the saints exult in glory; let them shout for joy upon their beds.

verses.kjv: Let the high praises of God be in their mouth, and a twoedged sword in their hand;
verses.bsb: May the high praises of God be in their mouths, and a double-edged sword in their hands,

verses.kjv: To execute vengeance upon the heathen, and punishments upon the people;
verses.bsb: to inflict vengeance on the nations and punishment on the peoples,

verses.kjv: To bind their kings with chains, and their nobles with fetters of iron;
verses.bsb: to bind their kings with chains and their nobles with shackles of iron,

verses.kjv: To execute upon them the judgment written: this honour have all his saints. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.bsb: to execute the judgment written against them. This honor is for all His saints.   Hallelujah!

verses.kjv: PRAISE ye the Lord. Praise God in his sanctuary: praise him in the firmament of his power.
verses.bsb: Hallelujah!   Praise God in His sanctuary. Praise Him in His mighty heavens.

verses.kjv: Praise him for his mighty acts: praise him according to his excellent greatness.
verses.bsb: Praise Him for His mighty acts; praise Him for His excellent greatness.

verses.kjv: Praise him with the sound of the trumpet: praise him with the psaltery and harp.
verses.bsb: Praise Him with the sound of the horn; praise Him with the harp and lyre.

verses.kjv: Praise him with the timbrel and dance: praise him with stringed instruments and organs.
verses.bsb: Praise Him with tambourine and dancing; praise Him with strings and flute.

verses.kjv: Praise him upon the loud cymbals: praise him upon the high sounding cymbals.
verses.bsb: Praise Him with clashing cymbals; praise Him with resounding cymbals.

verses.kjv: Let every thing that hath breath praise the Lord. Praise ye the Lord.
verses.bsb: Let everything that has breath praise the LORD!   Hallelujah!
